news.Title: 台股美股齊漲！他問資產配置必要性　網喊：多頭就是All in
news.Content:
[ FTNN新聞網 ]實習記者王保伶／綜合報導

隨著台股與美股持續走強，市場持續熱絡，不少投資人迅速累積資產，進而帶動關於「資產配置」的討論。一名網友發文指出，在近2個月不斷上漲的行情下，原先設定的股 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 近期台股與美股持續走強，引發關於資產配置必要性的討論。
• 部分投資人認為在多頭市場應提高股票曝險，採取「All in」或槓桿ETF策略。
• 另有投資人堅持資產配置以進行風險控管，透過每月新增資金進行再平衡。
• AI與科技股帶動的行情下，部分資金集中於元大台灣50（0050）、台積電（2330）等標的。
news.Keywords: 資產配置,再平衡,多頭市場,風險控管,報酬率

news.Title: Why Innodata Stock Skyrocketed 149% in May
news.Content: Innodata (NASDAQ: INOD) was one of several AI stocks to soar last month as the data-labeling specialist nearly doubled following its first-quarter earnings report early in the month, and the stock added on some gains from there. Sentiment toward AI stocks has shifted ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Innodata (INOD) stock surged 149% in May, primarily driven by its first-quarter earnings report and strong performance in the AI sector.
• The company reported a 54% revenue increase to $90.1 million, significantly beating estimates, and saw adjusted EBITDA jump 96% to $25 million (28% of revenue).
• Innodata secured new engagements with a major tech company, projected to generate $51 million in revenue this year, becoming its second-largest customer.
• The company raised its full-year revenue growth guidance to at least 40% and is trading at a high P/E ratio, reflecting investor optimism about its AI-driven growth potential.
news.Keywords: AI stocks, revenue growth, margin expansion, EBITDA, guidance increase

news.Title: 柏瑞投信：透過GIANT投資術，掌握台股AI產業升級投資契機
news.Content: 隨著AI技術持續深化並加速落地，全球科技產業進入新一輪成長週期。柏瑞投信表示，儘管短期仍有美國聯準會(Fed)利率政策前景未定，以及國際地緣政治持續動盪的不確定性存在，但是台股在AI產業鏈扮演關鍵角色地位的支撐下，企 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 柏瑞投信指出，儘管面臨利率政策與地緣政治的不確定性，台股在AI產業鏈扮演關鍵角色，企業獲利結構持續優化。
• 受惠於全球供應鏈重組與AI產業崛起，台股近年表現優於新興市場，資金聚焦半導體與伺服器相關AI供應鏈。
• 柏瑞投信建議透過GIANT投資術，從成長潛力、收益、品質、潛力及趨勢五大面向掌握台股AI產業投資機會。
• 柏瑞巨人基金推出後收N9級別，降低長期投資成本，並強調AI時代下台股的成長契機與風險控管。
news.Keywords: AI產業,台股,投資契機,GIANT投資術,風險控管

news.Title: 黃仁勳今舉行媒體問答 蔡力行驚喜現身
news.Content: 輝達（NVIDIA）執行長黃仁勳今（2）日於台北舉行媒體問答會，而聯發科執行長蔡力行也驚喜現身，並與黃仁勳 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 輝達執行長黃仁勳與聯發科執行長蔡力行一同出席媒體問答會，黃仁勳讚揚聯發科的工程技術世界一流。
• 雙方合作開發的RTX Spark超級晶片，採用台積電3奈米製程，整合輝達GPU與聯發科CPU，專為個人代理打造。
• RTX Spark晶片採用Arm架構，提升運算效能與AI應用能量，是輝達與聯發科在AI超級電腦後又一深度合作。
• 此合作象徵聯發科正式進軍Windows PC市場，未來將持續推動AI與高效運算領域創新。
news.Keywords: AI PC,GPU,CPU,合作夥伴,技術創新

news.Title: The Best Way to Invest in the SpaceX IPO Is Hiding in Plain Sight
news.Content: In anticipation of its initial public offering (IPO) on June 12, SpaceX filed its initial registration statement (Form S-1) with the Securities and Exchange Commission on May 20. The report gave investors never-before-seen access to SpaceX's inner workings, including its long-term growth plans, customer base, and more. SpaceX plans to list its Class A common stock on the Nasdaq and Nasdaq Texas under the ticker symbol SPCX. But there are ways to gain exposure to SpaceX besides buying the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX filed its IPO registration statement, planning to list on the Nasdaq under the ticker SPCX on June 12.
• The company operates Starlink satellites, dominates the commercial space launch industry, and owns xAI and the social media platform X.
• SpaceX generated $18.67 billion in revenue in 2025 but reported a $2.59 billion net loss, largely due to R&D expenses.
• At a potential $1.75 trillion valuation, SpaceX's IPO valuation would be approximately 94 times sales, raising concerns about its P/E ratio and potential underperformance relative to the S&P 500.
news.Keywords: IPO, satellite communications, space launch, valuation, R&D investment

news.Title: Rivian just achieved something Tesla has long dominated
news.Content: Tesla (TSLA) has developed one of the most important advantages in the electric vehicle (EV) industry over the years. The corporation doesn’t only move a lot of EVs. It has also been a benchmark for maximizing the driving range from every kilowatt-hour of battery capacity. It matters to drivers who weigh range, charge time and ownership expenses. It's also important to investors. An EV that is more efficient can offer a competitive range without a big battery pack. That can help the automakers decrease expenses, protect margins and price cars more aggressively. Tesla has had that edge for years, particularly ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Rivian's new R2 SUV matches Tesla Model Y's efficiency rating of 105 MPGe and 32 kWh/100 miles.
• The Rivian R2 Performance offers a longer range of 330 miles compared to the Tesla Model Y Performance's 306 miles.
• Pricing for the Rivian R2 Performance with Launch Package is nearly identical to the Tesla Model Y Performance, starting at $57,990 vs $57,490.
• The R2's design is more robust and heavier than the Model Y, making its competitive efficiency a significant technical achievement for Rivian.
news.Keywords: EV efficiency, range comparison, competitive landscape, performance metrics, automotive technology

news.Title: 記憶體雙雄活跳跳！華邦電亮燈漲停 南亞科突破400元大關雙創新高
news.Content: 受惠AI推論需求持續升溫，加上DRAM價格漲勢延續，記憶體雙雄今（2）日股價表現強勁，華邦電（2344）開盤不到 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受惠於AI推論需求升溫及DRAM價格上漲，華邦電（2344）亮燈漲停，南亞科（2408）股價創歷史新高。
• 華邦電4月自結獲利亮眼，稅後淨利74.88億元，每股盈餘1.66元，超越2024及2025年總和。
• 研調機構TrendForce指出，第一季DRAM合約價季增93-98%，整體營收季成長81%。
• 預期第二季DRAM出貨位元增幅有限，合約價仍可望季增58-63%，因原廠庫存低且優先供應AI伺服器。
news.Keywords: DRAM,AI伺服器,記憶體,漲價趨勢,營收成長

news.Title: Blue Origin launch pad repairs could take 'serious time', NASA chief tells CNBC
news.Content: June 1 (Reuters) - Damage to a Blue Origin launch pad from the spectacular explosion of the company's giant New Glenn rocket ‌during a test firing of its engines last week will "take ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Damage to Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket launch pad from a test firing explosion will require significant repair time, potentially extending to 2028.
• The explosion occurred during a static hot-fire test, causing extensive damage described as 'practically destroyed' by sources.
• This incident impacts Jeff Bezos's ambitions to compete with SpaceX in the private space launch market.
• The New Glenn rocket is crucial for NASA's Artemis moon missions, and the delay raises concerns about mission timelines.
news.Keywords: launch pad damage, rocket explosion, space launch, Artemis mission, operational delay

news.Title: 黃仁勳證實AI PC平台就是NVIDIA RTX Spark AI PC，聯發科是重要夥伴
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】NVIDIA執行長黃仁勳，在今早的媒體問答記者會中，邀來了聯發科(2454)執行長蔡力行，證實了市場傳言許久的N1/N1X的AI PC平台確實存在，就是NVIDIA RTX Spark AI PC。至於聯 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 輝達執行長黃仁勳證實，NVIDIA RTX Spark AI PC平台為市場傳言的N1/N1X AI PC平台，聯發科是其重要夥伴。
• 聯發科將從手機SoC供應商升級為NVIDIA AI PC平台共同架構夥伴，負責CPU SoC。
• 黃仁勳闡述AI PC架構為CPU+GPU+Memory整合，CPU負責工作調度，GPU負責AI推理，此架構稱為『Harness』。
• 聯發科執行長蔡力行表示，聯發科負責CPU，具備多媒體引擎、低功耗設計與能源效率；輝達提供GPU、CUDA等軟體生態系。
news.Keywords: AI PC,CPU,GPU,合作夥伴,平台架構

news.Title: 南亞科攻AI迎結構性成長，新廠拚2027年H2量產
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-06-02 09:58:41 數位內容中心 發佈

受到AI伺服器、AI PC、AI手機與邊緣運算需求帶動，南亞科（2408）已由傳統景氣循環型產業轉向結構性成長模式，記憶體產品組合正朝高容量 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受AI伺服器、PC、手機及邊緣運算需求帶動，南亞科（2408）已轉向結構性成長模式，調整產品組合朝高容量、高頻寬伺服器導向。
• 公司AI應用提升對HBM、DDR5與高容量LPDDR需求，10奈米級第二代（1B）製程已量產DDR5/DDR4，並計畫推出LPDDR產品。
• 南亞科規劃新廠於2027年下半年量產，預期顯著提升月產能；私募增資約787億元將用於先進記憶體製造與設備投資。
• 預估DRAM供需吃緊情況可能持續至2027年底，客戶已要求簽訂長期供貨合約，南亞科與多家國際AI客戶洽談合作機會。
news.Keywords: AI應用,DRAM,HBM,伺服器記憶體,結構性成長

news.Title: 與蔡力行同台談N1X新晶片　黃仁勳：將長期擴展此架構
news.Content: （中央社記者吳家豪台北2026年06月2日電）輝達（NVIDIA）執行長黃仁勳今天舉行全球媒體問答，與聯發科 (2454 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 輝達執行長黃仁勳與聯發科執行長蔡力行同台，討論雙方合作的Arm架構N1X晶片，黃仁勳表示將長期擴展此架構。
• N1X晶片專為個人AI代理打造，將搭載於RTX Spark系列Windows PC，聯發科負責設計客製化CPU。
• 黃仁勳表示，選擇與聯發科合作是因為其世界一流的工程技術，雙方投入數百名工程師合作近2年。
• 為滿足AI代理在裝置端運行的需求，需要高頻寬、低延遲、低功耗的SoC，輝達與微軟合作確保Windows相容性。
news.Keywords: AI晶片,CPU,SoC,合作夥伴,架構擴展

news.Title: Apple's WWDC Is June 8. Here's the 1 Announcement That Could Move the Stock
news.Content: Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) opens its Worldwide Developers Conference on June 8, and the keynote carries real weight for the stock. The company heads into the event trading near all-time highs, having climbed more than 50% over the past year -- and a good chunk of that run rests on a single expectation: that Apple is finally ready to show an artificial intelligence (AI) -powered ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple's WWDC on June 8th is critical, with expectations high for an AI-powered Siri update (iOS 27).
• The new Siri is reportedly leveraging Google's Gemini model, with Apple potentially paying $1 billion annually for access.
• Apple's premium valuation (P/E of 37) assumes successful AI integration driving upgrades and services revenue from its 2.5 billion active devices.
• Recent strong financial performance includes 17% YoY revenue growth to $111.2 billion in Q2, with Services revenue up 16% to $31 billion (gross margin >75%).
• Despite strong financials, a disappointing AI announcement could negatively impact the stock, while success could drive further gains.
news.Keywords: AI strategy, Siri update, developer conference, revenue growth, services margin

news.Title: 重押台積電！40％資金買「4大巨頭」 神級操盤手私藏股
news.Content: 人工智慧狂潮，推升供應鏈股價水漲船高，華爾街低調的神級操盤手Light Street Capital創辦人Glen Kacher重押40%資金 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 華爾街操盤手Glen Kacher將40%資金重押AI概念股，包括輝達、台積電、博通及超微，其中台積電佔比14.4%。
• Glen Kacher旗下基金績效亮眼，2023年報酬率45.7%，2024年上半年衝上59.4%。
• 台積電在先進晶片生產上具實質壟斷地位，是該操盤手最大持股；其亦看好輝達作為AI基礎設施之王。
• 博通在ASIC技術和資料中心網路領域領先，超微則在資料中心CPU領域具優勢，兩者均有巨大成長前景。
news.Keywords: AI概念股,半導體,投資組合,成長前景,市場壟斷

news.Title: 〈台股開盤〉AI開趴接著奏樂接著舞 漲逾500點創45915點新高後一度翻黑
news.Content: 輝達 (NVDA-US) 執行長黃仁勳在台北國際電腦展 (COMPUTEX) 主題演講中正式發表 RTX Spark 超級晶片，市場看好 AI PC 將成為下一波成長引擎，激勵輝達股價大漲 6.26%，並帶動台股在 AI 盛宴帶領下開高 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 輝達發表RTX Spark超級晶片，看好AI PC成為下一波成長引擎，激勵台股開盤大漲逾500點，創45915點新高後一度翻黑。
• 早盤台積電上漲1.27%至2385元，最高觸及2400元；鴻海上漲1.36%。
• 分析師指出，台股主要格局偏多，儘管追價力道不足，拉回仍獲短期均線支撐，技術指標持續向上。
• 美股方面，輝達大漲6.26%帶動費城半導體指數上漲1.06%，道瓊、那斯達克及S&P 500指數同步收紅。
news.Keywords: AI PC,台股,指數創新高,權值股,半導體指數

news.Title: 【Yahoo早盤】黃仁勳點火台股漲逾500點至45915點 分析師張家豪曝攻4萬6關鍵
news.Content: 輝達執行長黃仁勳在COMPUTEX 2026 發表新一代 AI PC 晶片，激勵輝達股價大漲逾6%，帶動美股四大指數同步收紅。受利多激勵，台股今（2）日開盤後一度大漲逾500點、衝上45,915點，不過 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 輝達執行長黃仁勳發表新一代AI PC晶片，激勵輝達股價大漲逾6%，帶動台股開盤一度大漲逾500點至45,915點。
• 分析師張家豪指出，台股維持強勢多頭格局，若權王台積電（2330）穩步墊高，指數有機會挑戰46,000點。
• 目前台股進入KD高檔鈍化，預期後續仍有強勁攻擊行情，清明節後到端午節前為台股獲利佳區間。
• 記憶體族群受Computex題材影響資金流向AI股，但長期缺貨情況難緩解，產業趨勢維持向上。
news.Keywords: AI PC,台股,多頭格局,台積電,記憶體

news.Title: 2張椅子藏伏筆！黃仁勳全球記者會「蔡力行站台」親揭RTX Spark秘辛
news.Content: 輝達執行長黃仁勳今（2）日一早在台北漢來大飯店舉行全球媒體問答，活動開場前，現場即擺放2張椅子，引發媒體猜測是否會有神秘嘉賓到場。最後時刻，聯發科副董事長暨執行長蔡力行驚喜現身，與黃仁勳同台對談，兩人也親自揭露雙方攜手 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 輝達執行長黃仁勳與聯發科副董事長蔡力行共同揭露雙方合作打造的新一代AI PC超級晶片RTX Spark。
• RTX Spark 結合聯發科的CPU、低功耗與多媒體技術，以及輝達的GPU、CUDA、Tensor Core與AI運算優勢。
• 該晶片採用台積電3奈米製程，搭載Blackwell RTX GPU及聯發科設計的20核心Grace CPU (代號N1X)，並透過MD-Link實現高頻寬、低延遲的統一記憶體架構。
• 黃仁勳強調，RTX Spark 的開發過程中，NVLink晶片對晶片互連技術是關鍵，且必須導入，而非傳統PCI Express架構。

news.Title: 黃仁勳：Vera Rubin供應鏈已全啟動仍難追上需求，強調Vera非傳統CPU
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】在NVIDIA執行長黃仁勳今早的媒體問題記者會中證實，NVIDIA仍然供不應求，而下一代AI平台的Vera Rub ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 輝達執行長黃仁勳證實，下一代AI平台Vera Rubin的供應鏈已啟動，但整體需求仍供不應求。
• Vera Rubin 供應鏈涵蓋SK海力士、美光、三星（HBM）、台積電（CoWoS、Silicon Photonics）、矽品（先進封測）、聯鈞、上詮、光聖、波若威（Silicon Photonics）、貿聯及嘉澤（Connectors）。
• 黃仁勳強調Vera Rubin並非傳統CPU，而是專為AI Agent設計，其單執行緒性能有25年來最大突破，能應對Agent工作模式所需之即時決策、Tool Calling、記憶體管理與推理控制。
• 黃仁勳表示，輝達雖有足夠供應支撐強勁成長，但仍處於供給受限（supply constrained）狀態。
news.Keywords: AI平台,供應鏈,供不應求,AI Agent,單執行緒性能

news.Title: Why AMD Stock Soared 46% in May
news.Content: Shares of Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ: AMD) , which primarily makes central processing units (CPUs) for various applications and graphics processing units (GPUs) for enabling artificial intelligence (AI) in data centers, soared 45.6% in May, according to data from S&P Global Market Intelligence . ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) stock surged 45.6% in May and 74% in April, significantly outperforming Nvidia and the broader market.
• Q1 revenue reached $10.3 billion (up 38% YoY), driven by a 57% increase in the Data Center segment to $5.8 billion, fueled by EPYC CPUs and Instinct GPUs.
• GAAP EPS jumped 91% to $0.84, and adjusted EPS was $1.37 (up 43% YoY), beating analyst expectations.
• AMD forecasts Q2 revenue of approximately $11.2 billion (up 46% YoY) with an adjusted gross margin of 56%.
• The company highlights strong momentum in AI infrastructure, with accelerating demand for high-performance CPUs and GPUs.
news.Keywords: stock performance, revenue growth, data center, AI infrastructure, forward guidance

news.Title: 台股漲436點 台積電漲40元 記憶體「2檔」噴7%
news.Content:
輝達執行長黃仁勳舉辦的GTC主題演講，讓AI帶領台股持續延燒，台股今（2）日早盤開高震盪，上漲436點，來到45805點創新高，漲幅1.02%，預估成交量1.4兆，櫃買指數則開高震盪，早盤來到447.87點，上漲1.85點，漲幅0.37%。

權值股中，台積電早盤開高震盪，來到2395元，上漲40元，漲幅1.7%，鴻海早盤來到294元，漲0.5元，漲幅0.17%，台達電來到2430元，漲10元，漲幅0.41%，聯發科來到4805元，漲250元，漲幅5.49%。

PC概念股也同步上揚，仁寶、華碩、宏碁、緯創開盤就攻上漲停，其中，仁寶已連拉三根漲停板，微星也有5%的漲幅。

記憶體族群則延續強勁的走勢，華邦電來到181元，漲幅逾7%，南亞科來到410元，漲幅7.44%，旺宏來到174.元，漲幅4.18%，晶豪科也有逾4%的漲幅。

台塑四寶中，南亞轉型電子材料受到市場關注，繼昨日漲停後今天再度帶量衝高，股價來到114.5元續創波段新高，台化則來到55.2元，也又逾2%的漲幅。

（封面圖／東森新聞）

news.Title: 美股收高激勵！台股早盤大漲527點　台積電開2390元
news.Content:
即時中心／綜合報導

投資人一方面關注美伊談判進展，一方面看好輝達發布全新個人電腦晶片，進一步提振市場信心，美股主要指數週一（1日）小幅上漲；台指期盤後也上漲505點。台股今（2）日開盤小漲51.02點、以45,388.93點開出，隨後指數衝高，目前指數上漲527.36點、來到45,865.27點。台積電ADR收盤上揚4.11％，台積電（2330）今以2390元開出、上漲35元。

電子權值股方面，鴻海（2317）開298.5元，漲4元；聯發科（2454）以4,970元開出，上漲415元；廣達（2382）開375元，漲2.5元；台達電（2308）以2,430元開出，漲10元；日月光投控（3711）開600元，跌1元；聯電（2303）開147元，漲1元；大立光（3008）開3,780元，跌55元。

金融方面，富邦金（2881）以110.5元平盤開出；國泰金（2882）開88.5元，漲0.3元；中信金（2891）跌0.1元，以62元開出；兆豐金（2886）跌0.25元，開41.2元；華南金（2880）開32.5元，跌0.35元；第一金（2892）開平盤27.75元；合庫金（5880）小跌0.05元，以22.8元開出。

《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。

news.Content:
台股昨（1日）衝上45K大關之後，資金狂潮未歇，今（2日）早盤以45388.93點開出，隨後大漲超過500點，台積電上漲40元觸及2395元，聯發科續飆逾5%，台達電同步上漲10元，觸及2430元。

受惠於電腦展題材與輝達進軍AI PC市場，電子五哥仍吸金，仁寶續飆漲停44.35元，緯創大漲逾7%，英業達與和碩上漲超過2%，廣達小漲近1%。PC品牌廠華碩與宏碁飆上漲停，微星也上漲超過3%。

黃仁勳昨於GTC Taipei主題演講上釋出利多，攜手聯發科推出「RTX Spark」晶片，正式進軍AI PC市場。同時，黃仁勳也宣告新一代AI平台Vera Rubin全面量產，公開全球首個開源物理AI模型Cosmos 3，以及AI工廠、企業Agent布局。

周一輝達股價大漲6.26%，收在224.36美元，台積電ADR上漲17.18美元（或4.11%）至435.63美元，鴻海ADR也大漲5.43%收在19.22美元。輝達競爭對手超微下跌1.16%至510.13美元，英特爾走低4.67%至109.33美元，高通重挫8.78%至228.99美元。

台股接連創新高，朝5萬點大關邁進。展望後市，工商報導，統一投顧董事長黎方國表示，全世界對AI的需求太強勁，這是實打實的投資與訂單，最大受惠的國家依序為美國、台灣與韓國，這股AI浪潮會一路延續到2030年，預測台股最快6月底前有挑戰5萬點大關的機會。

即使不斷挑戰紀錄，但居高思危想法不可少，中經院院長連賢明昨示警，股市漲勢超出市場預期，通常金融市場過熱後，修正風險會隨之而來，且修正幅度會比想像更大，要留意潛在的波動。

news.Title: 聯發科狂噴9%！台積電漲40元至2395元　台股開高漲541點「闖45800點大關」
news.Content:
[ FTNN新聞網 ]記者薛明峻／台北報導

儘管油價走升，在AI晶片龍頭輝達（NVDA-US）強漲6.26%帶動下，美股四大指數周一全面收紅，道瓊、那斯達克、標普500均改寫歷史新高，費半更勁揚1.06%；台積電ADR則大漲4.11%，推升台股今（2）日開高上漲51.02點至45388.93點，隨著台積電漲40元至2395元，聯發科大漲9%，加權指數一度衝上45879.58點，大漲541.67點。

五大電子權值股中，權王台積電（2330）開高漲35元至2390元，一度漲40元至2395元，漲幅1.70%；台達電（2308）開高漲10元至2430元，一度漲20元至2440元，漲幅0.83%，隨後翻黑；聯發科（2454）開高漲415元至4970元，漲幅9.11%，高檔震盪；鴻海（2317）開高漲4元至297.5元，一度漲6元至299.5元，漲幅2.04%；日月光投控（3711）則以600元開出，下跌1元，隨後翻紅漲7元至608元，漲幅1.16%。

news.Title: 蔡力行現身黃仁勳記者會，同台暢談N1X晶片合作
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-06-02 09:07:33 黃立安 發佈

輝達(NVIDIA)執行長黃仁勳今(2)日舉行全球記者會，聯發科(2454)執行長蔡力行驚喜現身，雙方同台對談共同開發的N1X晶片。黃仁勳(圖左)表示，當初希望打造一顆完整支援Windows、專為AI時代設計的新型電腦晶片，因此第一時間便想到在低功耗SoC設計領域具深厚實力的聯發科。

黃仁勳指出，雙方投入數百位工程師、合作超過兩年，共同打造具統一記憶體架構的N1X晶片，透過高頻寬互連技術，CPU、GPU與Tensor Core皆可直接存取記憶體，不僅具備優異能源效率，也可100%相容Windows、CUDA及NVIDIA Tensor Core生態系。

蔡力行則表示，這是一段非常精彩的旅程，但過程並不容易，尤其相容性相關工作需要投入大量工程資源與技術能力。他指出，聯發科擅長打造低功耗、高效能CPU，搭配NVIDIA GPU後展現出相當亮眼的成果。

現場黃仁勳也笑問蔡力行「我們還是朋友嗎？」蔡力行則回應「永遠都是」。蔡力行透露，黃仁勳過去曾強調「不能妥協，必須做出真正偉大的產品」，也促使雙方持續挑戰既有架構限制，打造更適合AI時代的運算平台。

黃仁勳進一步表示，N1X也與Microsoft密切合作，成為史上Windows相容性及x86模擬相容性最佳的晶片之一，同時也是目前全球唯一完整支援OpenGL全系列版本的行動晶片，可順利執行CATIA、Ansys等專業工程軟體。

蔡力行表示，近期與客戶交流時已感受到市場高度期待，有客戶甚至形容這項產品讓產業重新獲得新生命。他強調，對聯發科而言，能與NVIDIA這樣的世界級企業合作意義重大，雙方不只是打造產品，更共同創造具突破性的創新成果，未來也期待持續深化合作。

群聯攜手Intel攻AI PC，aiDAPTIV突破記憶體限制

《GTC Taipei》黃仁勳：Agentic AI來臨，VR為輝達最具野心計畫

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 〈COMPUTEX〉輝達全球媒體問答 聯發科蔡力行驚喜現身 大談未來N2X
news.Content:
輝達 (NVDA-US) 執行長黃仁勳今 (2) 日舉辦全球媒體問答，聯發科 (2454-TW) 執行長蔡力行驚喜現身，雙方談論一起合作 N1X 的旅程，並透露 N2X、N3X 已經在進行中，將持續拓展雙方的相關業務。

黃仁勳指出，輝達選擇聯發科合作的原因，就是因為聯發科在各方面的工程能力都是世界級的，而這點已經透過這次合作被證實。

蔡力行接著表示，雙方合作這是一項龐大的工作，但他非常興奮，前一天聽完黃仁勳的主題演講後，感覺非常振奮，因為 PC 似乎在 40 年後迎來了新的生命，這套架構由 CPU 與 GPU 透過高速連結串接，並採用統一記憶體架構，是非常適合 Agentic AI 的正確架構，也能支援遊戲等應用。

蔡力行也表示，聯發科團隊與輝達團隊都非常興奮，特別感謝輝達工程團隊，感謝雙方在合作中非常大方，也帶來很高的挑戰。

news.Title: 台股早盤漲逾500點 台積電漲45元
news.Content:
美股4大指數1日收盤創新高，台北股市今天（2日）開盤漲51.02點，加權股價指數為45388.93點，成交金額新台幣191.78億元。早盤最高漲541.67點，加權指數為45879.58點。台積電漲45元，達2400元。

其他權值股早盤表現，鴻海上漲5元，為298.5元，聯發科上漲275元，為4830元；台達電為2420元平盤。

電子類股指數上漲0.96%、金融類股指數下跌0.17%，代表中小型股票的櫃買指數上漲0.55%。

台股昨天收在45337.91點，美股四大指數道瓊工業指數小漲46.42點或0.09%，收51078.88點；標準普爾500指數小升19.90點或0.26%，收7599.96點；那斯達克指數上揚114.19點或0.42%，收27086.81點；費城半導體指數揚升136.27點或1.06%，收12965.65點。AI晶片龍頭輝達（NVDA-US）上漲6.26%、台積電ADR上漲4.11%。

news.Title: TSMC executive drops blunt message on AI chip’s next frontier
news.Content: Wall Street has spent years pricing AI chip stocks on one core assumption: raw computing power wins. More transistors, more speed, more performance. That was the race, and investors bid up names including Nvidia (NVDA), Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSM), and Broadcom (AVGO) accordingly. Kevin Zhang , senior vice president of business development at TSMC, just challenged that assumption directly. Speaking to reporters at a conference in Amsterdam on May 28, Zhang said the thing TSMC’s customers are demanding above all else right now is not more horsepower. It is energy efficiency. “The area customers most want improvement in is ...
news.AI_Summary:
• TSMC's executive Kevin Zhang stated that customer demand is prioritizing energy efficiency over raw computing power for AI chips.
• This shift challenges the long-held assumption that more transistors and speed are the primary drivers of AI chip value.
• Data center operators face constraints from electricity costs, grid limitations, and heat management, making efficiency critical.
• TSMC is focusing on advanced packaging, chip stacking, and photonics to improve efficiency, alongside node advancements.
• The company expects its chips to reduce power consumption by up to 30% while increasing performance by over 20% with its N2 and A14 generations.
news.Keywords: energy efficiency, AI chips, semiconductor manufacturing, TSMC, customer demand

news.Title: These Linked Stocks Are 2 of the Best Ways to Play the Ongoing AI Boom
news.Content: The artificial intelligence (AI) market is booming, with both AI infrastructure and cloud computing providers seeing huge growth. Two of the companies at the forefront of this charge are Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) and Broadcom (NASDAQ: AVGO) , which just so happen to have co-developed Alphabet's well-renowned Tensor Processing Units (TPUs). TPUs link Alphabet and Broadcom together and have been a huge part of their success. These ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet (GOOGL) and Broadcom (AVGO) have co-developed Tensor Processing Units (TPUs), a key driver of their AI success.
• Alphabet's TPUs provide a cost advantage for AI model training and inference, contributing to a 63% surge in cloud revenue to $20 billion in Q1.
• Alphabet's cloud backlog reached $460 billion, and it now allows select customers to order TPUs via Broadcom.
• Broadcom records TPU revenue and expects over $100 billion in ASIC revenue by FY2027, with Anthropic placing a significant $21 billion order.
• The partnership leverages Alphabet's chip design and Broadcom's IP and integration expertise, positioning both for long-term AI growth.
news.Keywords: TPU development, AI infrastructure, cloud computing, custom ASICs, revenue growth

news.Title: Is Analog Devices Stock Outperforming the S&P 500?
news.Content: With a market cap of $201.6 billion, Analog Devices, Inc. (ADI) is a leading semiconductor company that designs, manufactures, and markets integrated circuits (ICs), software, and subsystem products for customers worldwide. ADI distributes its products through direct sales, third-party distributors, independent representatives, and ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Analog Devices (ADI), a mega-cap semiconductor company, has outperformed the S&P 500 year-to-date (48.5% vs 11%) and over the past 52 weeks (88.2% vs 28.6%).
• Q2 2026 results surpassed expectations with $3.62 billion in revenue and $3.09 adjusted EPS, driven by strong bookings in Industrial, Automotive, and Communications.
• The company provided an upbeat Q3 forecast of $3.9 billion revenue and $3.30 adjusted EPS, exceeding analyst estimates.
• ADI announced a $1.5 billion acquisition of Empower Semiconductor to bolster its AI-focused power management portfolio.
• Analysts maintain a 'Strong Buy' consensus rating with a mean price target of $445.72, indicating a 10.7% upside potential.
news.Keywords: semiconductor performance, Q2 results, forward guidance, AI demand, stock outperformance

news.Title: 券商晨訊台股投資建議摘要 (1) 2026年 6月 2日
news.Content:
【統一證券】

本週圍繞Computex展及科技大佬演說。台股目前維持良性輪動的高檔震盪格局，惟技術面高檔鈍化，加上外資期貨空單近6萬5千口，短線應提防行情隨時劇烈波動，操作保持適度的資金彈性，建議低接不追高。選股以流動性佳的中大型AI權值股為主，技術面轉強及有題材的個股為輔。長線追蹤族群：台積電及先進製程/封裝、高速傳輸(含光傳輸)、載板與PCB、機箱滑軌、被動元件、功率半導體、航太衛星、特用化學及漲價概念等族群。

【國票證券】

美伊戰爭隨著時間拉長影響慢慢退去，加上Computex開展催化下，市場對科技族群投資情緒高漲，買盤推升大盤持續創下新高紀錄，趨勢偏多未變，不過短線乖離偏高，操作上宜待壓回短均附近再擇機介入。持續留意面板雙虎友達與群創，面板產業長期受中國產能過剩影響報價易跌難漲，但雙虎朝向先進封裝、低軌衛星等布局逐漸出現成效，營運有望走出困境重返榮耀，在當前的盤勢中可多留意布局時機。

news.Title: 台股噴發衝破4.5萬點　中經院院長示警：修正幅度恐比想像更大
news.Content:
在AI人工智慧熱潮下，台股多頭行情全面噴發，加權指數於1日開盤後一路強攻，盤中漲近1200點，最高來到45931點，再創歷史新高，終場收在45337.91點，同步改寫收盤紀錄。中華經濟研究院院長 連賢明 坦言漲勢超乎預期，雖然目前難以直接判斷股市是否已經過熱，但任何金融市場過熱後往往伴隨修正風險，「修正的幅度往往可能比大家想像得更大」。

2026年尚未過半，台股已頻頻刷新紀錄。根據統計，台灣股市5月總市值正式超越印度，成為全球第五大股市。本週2026台北國際電腦展COMPUTEX登場，加上台積電6月4日即將召開股東會，再度點燃市場對人工智慧供應鏈的期待。

對於近期股市表現，中經院院長連賢明1日坦言漲勢超乎預期。他表示，「如果有預期到股票市場會漲這麼快，我就先去買了」，並指出加權指數從突破3萬點後一路上攻至4萬5000點附近，漲幅明顯超出許多人預期。連賢明強調，雖然目前難以直接判斷股市是否已經過熱，但任何金融市場過熱後往往伴隨修正風險，「修正的幅度往往可能比大家想像得更大」。

經濟基本面方面，主計總處公布今年第一季經濟成長率高達14.55%，甚至高於去年第四季，5月底最新經濟預測更將全年經濟成長率上修至9.64%。連賢明表示，AI人工智慧的強勁需求可以支撐出口表現，景氣熱絡的情況可持續至年底。

中研院經濟所研究員簡錦漢分析，人工智慧硬體需求遠超市場原先想像，也讓各大機構持續上修台灣今年經濟成長預測。他指出，民間消費成長率預估達3.6%，屬於偏高水準，顯示內需動能同步升溫。

簡錦漢進一步指出，若以市值推算財富效果，自2023年1月至今，台股已累積創造約新台幣107兆元帳面財富。雖然這些仍屬「紙上富貴」，但民眾在感受到資產增值後，消費信心往往也會跟著提升，進一步帶動整體消費市場。

中經院公布的5月台灣採購經理人指數（PMI）為61.4%，較4月持續攀升，已連續8個月擴張，高於榮枯線50%，寫下近5年新高；非製造業經理人指數（NMI）則為58.2%，維持在高檔擴張區間。連賢明認為，從目前數據來看，台灣景氣確實處於相當熱絡的階段，人工智慧帶動的出口與投資動能仍是支撐經濟成長的主要力量，但投資人面對市場高檔時，仍應留意潛在波動與修正風險。

news.Title: 華邦電4月每股賺1.66元，達首季74%水準
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-06-02 08:40:44 新聞中心 發佈

華邦電(2344)因公司有價證券於集中交易市場達公布注意交易資訊標準，故公布4月自結損益，4月營收192.45億元，年增182.23%；稅後淨利74.88億元，年增21608.78%，每股盈餘1.66元、達首季2.25元的74%水準。

華邦電董事長焦佑鈞於上週五股東會中表示，AI發展速度超出預期，記憶體市場進入結構性的缺貨，且目前缺貨已從DRAM擴大到NAND Flash以及NOR Flash，預計供不應求的情況將會延續到明(2027)年下半年都難以緩解。

營運方面，華邦電表示，第二季DRAM、NAND Flash及NOR Flash報價漲勢均優於原先預期，單季營收與獲利表現將較第一季提升，公司對下半年市場需求及營運表現維持樂觀看法。

華邦電：記憶體供不應求恐至明年H2也難緩解

台股焦點：品安(8088.TW)

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 【統一證券晨訊】Computex開展　台股圍繞AI熱潮續燒
news.Content:
日期：2026年 6月 2日

※盤勢分析

Computex開展，台股圍繞AI熱潮續燒

※昨日盤勢

computex展前夕，黃仁勳發表GTC Taipei 主題演講、眾多科技領袖參與高

峰對談，AI盛宴帶領台股開高走高，台積電早盤衝破2400元、加權指數走揚近4

萬6大關，隨後因台積電漲幅收斂，終場加權指數以上影線紅K再創新高。在AI需

求驅動下，記憶體與被動元件持續受投資人青睞。輝達正式宣告個人電腦進入全

新時代，AI Agent 將成為新一代 PC 的核心應用型態，激勵AI PC族群再度成為

盤面焦點；黃仁勳演說中表示AI能提高軟體工程師生產力，此說法點出資安的重

要性，軟體股同時因低基期優勢表現剽悍；另外，物理AI正推動機器人邁向下一

階段，相關概念股亦大放異彩。權值股方面，台積電收平盤，鴻海上漲1.56%，

聯發科上漲5.68%，廣達漲停上漲9.88%，台達電下跌1.02%。

盤面強勢股，廣達、華碩、聯茂、金居、台勝科、世芯-KY、訊芯-KY、長科

*、九豪、群創、山林水、新興等共117檔漲停；GIS-KY、鈦昇、有成精密、金山

電、大立光等漲幅9%以上；盤面弱勢股，睿生光電、德微及尚茂跌停；嘉晶、台

半、欣銓、東陽、敬鵬、印能科技等跌幅7%以上。終場台灣加權指數上漲604.97

點，以45337.91點作收，成交量1.48兆元。

觀察盤面變化，三大類股全面上漲，電子上漲1.21%、傳產上漲2.18%、金融

上漲1.88%。在次族群部份以塑膠、資服、光電表現較佳，分別上漲7.79%、

7.47%、5.29%。

※資金動向

三大法人合計買超380.67億元。其中外資買超368.17億元，投信買超77.59

億元，自營商賣超65.09億元。外資買超前五大為群創、台玻、台新新光金、南

亞科、國泰金；賣超前五大為力積電、友達、華南金、華新、長榮航。投信買超

前五大為台新新光金、華南金、長榮航、兆豐金、中信金；賣超前五大為聯電、

遠東新、國泰金、仁寶、富邦金。資券變化方面，融資增94.19億元，融資餘額

為5657.79億元，融券減0.69萬張，融券餘額為23.49萬張。外資台指期部位，空

單增加4023口，淨空單部位64673口，借券賣出金額451.03億元。類股成交比重

：電子88.32%、傳產8.80%、金融2.88%。

※今日盤勢分析

川普週一表示，美國與伊朗可望在未來一週內達成協議，延長目前停火安排

，並推動重新開放荷姆茲海峽。產業面：在輝達發表新一代 AI 個人電腦 (PC)

晶片、股價漲逾 6%，科技股領軍衝鋒，週一美股四大指數齊揚，台積電ADR上漲

4.11%。

台股後市分析如下：第一、輝達推出首款用於Windows作業系統的PC系統超

級晶片「RTX Spark」，當中的CPU由聯發科與輝達攜手打造，代號為「N1X」。

黃仁勳高喊，N1X是「世界上最令人驚嘆的晶片」，相關終端裝置預計秋天陸續

推出。同時提及，Token成為能帶來營收的獲利單位、AI是GDP產生器，代理式AI

時代來臨。接下來將是軟體公司發展的黃金盛世，前提是軟體必須以一種AI代理

人能夠使用的方式呈現，這將會是一項重大的突破。

第二、台達電總裁張訓海於輝達 NVIDIA GTCLive at Taipei 2026 會前直

播中指出，除了目前的 800V電源系統外，5 到 10年前投入研發的固態變壓器

(Solid-State Transformer, SST)，預計最慢明年迎來市場爆發，台達電也持續

將電源與散熱系統深度整合，發揮最大效益。

第三、技術面觀察，週一台股開高走高，成交量量縮收盤再創新高，技術指

標KD與RSI均持續向上延伸，MACD紅柱體擴大，目前資金充沛維持良性輪漲，盤

勢仍由多方掌握發球權。OTC指數同步走揚，後續應留意若產生資金排擠，中小

型股將依題材各自表現。

第四、盤面資金焦聚AI PC、資服、PCB材料、被動元件、記憶體等族群，包

括：廣達、安碁資訊、金居、國巨*、南亞科等表現強勢。

※投資策略

本週圍繞Computex展及科技大佬演說。台股目前維持良性輪動的高檔震盪格

局，惟技術面高檔鈍化，加上外資期貨空單近6萬5千口，短線應提防行情隨時劇

烈波動，操作保持適度的資金彈性，建議低接不追高。選股以流動性佳的中大型

AI權值股為主，技術面轉強及有題材的個股為輔。長線追蹤族群：台積電及先進

製程/封裝、高速傳輸(含光傳輸)、載板與PCB、機箱滑軌、被動元件、功率半導

體、航太衛星、特用化學及漲價概念等族群。

news.Title: Bank of America reiterates Amazon stock forecast at tipping point
news.Content: Amazon (AMZN) stock is up about 14.63% year to date, at the time of writing, Monday afternoon, June 1. Meanwhile, the SPDR S&P 500 Index (SPY) is up about 11.01% in the same period. And while Amazon has just slightly outpaced the S&P 500, it has also outpaced all but two Magnificent 7 members in the same period. Here is how the other Magnificent 7 members have performed: Alphabet (GOOGL) is up 19.95%. Nvidia (NVDA) is up 18.03%. Apple ...
news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: This News From Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Could Shift the Stock Into Overdrive
news.Content: Nvidia 's (NASDAQ: NVDA) GPU Technology Conference (GTC) Taipei kicked off this week. As a major regional edition of the company's flagship GTC event, it promised to provide a view into recent developments in artificial intelligence (AI) , gathering developers from around the world who will shape the future of AI. It is one of several annual events that showcase Nvidia's latest products, highlight important collaborations, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia unveiled the RTX Spark AI superchip for PCs, designed in collaboration with Microsoft, leveraging Grace CPU and Blackwell GPU for a native Windows experience with AI agents.
• The company also launched the Vera CPU, designed for agentic AI, which is up to 1.8 times faster than legacy x86 processors and is already in full production with major clients like Anthropic, OpenAI, and SpaceX.
• The AI PC market is projected to grow from $58 billion in 2025 to $321 billion by 2035, with Nvidia's Vera CPU targeting a new $200 billion TAM.
• Nvidia reported record Q1 revenue of $81.6 billion, up 85% year-over-year, driven by data center revenue of $75 billion (up 92%), and is guiding for 95% Q2 revenue growth.
news.Keywords: AI Superchip, Agentic AI, Vera CPU, PC Market, Data Center Revenue

news.Title: Nvidia sends PC makers a message they can't ignore
news.Content: Nvidia ( NVDA ) believes the next battle will take place somewhere altogether different. At GTC Taipei, the firm unveiled RTX Spark , a new Windows platform designed for artificial intelligence agents. Rather than just helping users work faster, Nvidia envisions computers that can also reason through jobs, automate workflows, find files, and interact with software on behalf of users. This announcement is not just another hardware launch. It’s a warning to the wider PC business that the next upgrade cycle could be driven by ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia unveiled RTX Spark, a new Windows platform for AI agents designed to enable PCs to reason, automate workflows, and interact with software.

news.Title: Morgan Stanley resets Microsoft stock price target
news.Content: Big tech companies spend enormous sums of money all the time. They buy back stock, pay dividends , make acquisitions, and write checks that would make a defense contractor blush. Most of that spending is legible to investors. You can model it, forecast it, and plug it into a spreadsheet. But there is a specific kind of capital spending that breaks conventional financial modeling, and that is the kind where a company is building infrastructure for demand that doesn't exist yet. That is exactly what Microsoft ( MSFT ) is doing right now, and it's why a new research note ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Morgan Stanley's analysis suggests Microsoft's significant capital expenditure on AI datacenter infrastructure is ahead of current revenue forecasts.
• The firm introduced 'revenue per megawatt' metric, indicating Microsoft's cloud ecosystem generates $20-30 million per MW, projected to decline slightly by FY28.
• Microsoft's installed datacenter capacity is expected to scale from 5 GW in FY24 to 20 GW by FY28, with a $190 billion projected capex for FY26, a 61% increase.
• Azure revenue grew 40% in F3Q26, exceeding expectations, while total revenue was up 18% year-over-year.
• The report highlights a potential gap between Microsoft's infrastructure build-out and Wall Street's revenue expectations, suggesting room for upward revisions.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, datacenter capacity, capital expenditure, revenue outlook, Azure growth

news.Title: Meta Is Launching Chatbot Subscriptions. META Stock Bulls Need a Way to Justify AI Costs.
news.Content: Meta Platforms (META) is entering a delicate new phase of the artificial intelligence (AI) race. After spending tens of billions of dollars on AI infrastructure, custom chips, and massive data center expansion, the social media giant is now searching for ways to convince investors that the spending spree will eventually pay off. That pressure is becoming increasingly visible. Meta recently unveiled paid subscription tiers for its AI chatbot across Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp, while simultaneously pushing through another major round of layoffs, as soaring AI compute costs weigh on margins. The new monetization push is expected to include Meta AI ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms is launching paid subscription tiers for its AI chatbot across Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp, starting at $3.99/month.
• The company is also implementing layoffs as high AI compute costs weigh on margins, with projected 2026 capital expenditures reaching up to $145 billion.
• Meta's stock has fallen 24.6% from its 52-week high, down 8.45% year-to-date, due to investor concerns about monetizing AI investments.
• Bulls believe chatbot subscriptions and AI-powered advertising could eventually offset massive compute costs.
news.Keywords: AI monetization, subscription tiers, capital expenditure, operating margins, investor sentiment

news.Title: Better Investment Option: SpaceX or Cerebras?
news.Content: The IPO market is heating up, with SpaceX expected to become the largest IPO of all time. Both SpaceX and Cerebras are working to position themselves to become eventual artificial intelligence (AI) leaders in their respective markets. Let's take a closer look to see which one has the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The article compares SpaceX and Cerebras Systems as potential AI leaders, with SpaceX's Starlink service showing strong recurring revenue growth (32% increase to $3.3 billion in Q1) and subscriber growth (2.3 million to 10.3 million).
• SpaceX's ambitious AI business aims to create data centers in space, a $26.5 trillion opportunity, despite technical challenges like chip lifespan and cooling.
• Cerebras Systems focuses on the AI inference market with its wafer-sized chips that offer 15x faster inference than GPUs due to integrated SRAM, though its systems are currently niche and pricey.

• The article suggests SpaceX's IPO valuation may be driven by hype, similar to Tesla's premium valuation.
news.Keywords: IPO, AI, Data Centers, Space Technology, Semiconductor

news.Title: Nvidia’s AI Monopoly Could Push It to Become a $10 Trillion Company by 2030
news.Content: Artificial intelligence (AI) is creating trillion-dollar winners, but Nvidia’s (NVDA) jump to a $5 trillion giant is probably the fastest the market has ever seen. Nvidia joined the $1 trillion club in June 2023, driven by a massive increase in AI and data center demand. But it did not take decades to reach the $5 trillion club. In fact, it did so in just over two years, in October 2025. Today, the chip giant is valued at $5.2 trillion by market cap. The move was largely driven by Nvidia's dominance in AI chips, strong demand for its ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia has rapidly reached a $5.2 trillion market valuation, driven by dominance in AI chips, strong demand for its Blackwell GPU platform, and significant data center spending by major tech companies.
• The company's Q1 fiscal 2027 revenue reached $82 billion, an 85% year-over-year increase, with the data center segment growing 92% YoY and 21% sequentially.
• Nvidia's data center operations are now equally split between hyperscale ($38 billion revenue) and ACIE ($37 billion revenue), indicating diversified growth.
• AI infrastructure spending is projected to reach $3 trillion to $4 trillion annually by the end of the decade, with hyperscale CapEx potentially reaching $1 trillion by 2027.
• Nvidia is targeting a new $200 billion market opportunity with its Vera CPU, designed for AI workloads, and is preparing for its Rubin systems.
news.Keywords: AI Dominance, Data Center Demand, GPU Platform, Market Cap Growth, Infrastructure Spending

news.Title: Meet the Latest $1 Trillion Stock
news.Content: Back in August 2018, Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) became the first stock to cross the $1 trillion valuation threshold. Now, 15 companies are worth $1 trillion or more . There will be more and more $1 trillion companies over time, and eventually this threshold will become ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology has achieved a $1 trillion market capitalization due to unprecedented and ongoing demand for computing power, particularly for AI.
• Micron's market cap grew from approximately $105 billion a year ago to over $1 trillion, driven by the AI hyperscalers' need for DRAM and other memory chips.
• A significant shortage of memory chips has driven prices higher, benefiting Micron's revenue and earnings growth.
• Micron can currently meet only half to two-thirds of production demand, suggesting the shortage will persist.
• Micron projects the total addressable market for its high-bandwidth memory (HBM) to expand from $35 billion in 2025 to $100 billion by 2028.
news.Keywords: Memory Chips, AI Demand, HBM, Market Cap, Supply Shortage

news.Title: Why Salesforce Was Rallying Again Today

Salesforce rallied along with many other software-as-a-service companies today, after Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) CEO Jensen Huang made positive comments about the future of software stocks at a Computex presentation in Taiwan ...
news.AI_Summary:

• Huang believes agentic AI will significantly increase the use of software tools, leading to a massive step-up in activity for enterprise software companies.
• Salesforce, trading at roughly 15 times this year's earnings estimates (its lowest valuation in years), could benefit from this AI-driven demand.
• The company announced an additional $2 billion investment in France through 2030, focusing on an AI innovation hub and education.
• Salesforce's aggressive $25 billion share repurchase program signals confidence in its future, especially if it transitions to a usage-based pricing model.
news.Keywords: Enterprise Software, AI Disruption, Agentic AI, Investment, Valuation

news.Content: When a company such as Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) has grown the way it has -- at an exceptionally high rate for years -- you may be tempted to believe that it may soon be approaching a peak. However, according to CEO Jensen Huang, that isn't ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang sees significant future growth opportunities, identifying a new market worth hundreds of billions of dollars.
• The company is focusing on agentic AI, which requires CPUs to manage multi-step processes, and has introduced its Vera chip as a dedicated CPU for agents.
• The Vera chip opens a new $200 billion total addressable market for Nvidia, previously untapped.
• Nvidia's stock, despite its massive gains and $5.1 trillion market cap, may still be considered undervalued with a forward P/E of 24 and a PEG ratio of 0.65.

news.Keywords: Agentic AI, CPU, Total Addressable Market, Valuation, Growth Opportunity

news.Title: Why Constellation Energy Stock Slumped on Monday
news.Content: Shares of Constellation Energy (NASDAQ: CEG) slumped today, trading 7% lower as of 2:20 p.m. ET Monday. Some institutional investors are selling shares in the largest nuclear energy company in the U.S., and retail investors aren't happy about that. But that's not how ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Constellation Energy shares fell 7% as certain institutional shareholders are selling 11 million shares at $281 per share, a discount to the previous closing price.
• The stock price decline is attributed to valuation concerns stemming from the large block sale.
• Constellation Energy is not issuing new shares, and the underlying business fundamentals remain strong, including its dominance in nuclear energy and expanded capacity through the Calpine acquisition.
• The company plans to purchase 2 million shares at the same price, signaling management's belief in the stock's value.
• The acquisition of Calpine for $16.4 billion has transformed Constellation Energy into a major player in nuclear, natural gas, and clean energy, positioning it to benefit from AI data center power demand.
news.Keywords: Institutional Sale, Valuation Concerns, Energy Sector, Acquisition, AI Data Center Demand

news.Title: Are Investors Making a Mistake by Waiting for a Better Market Entry Point?
news.Content: "This time is different." Has any phrase in investing aged worse? Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue » Railroads were going to change everything in the late 1800s. They did, but most railroad stocks still went bust. Radio was the future in the 1920s. It was, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The article discusses the historical parallels of transformative technologies like railroads, radio, and the internet with the current AI boom, cautioning that a transformative technology does not guarantee a good investment.
• It highlights the importance of valuation and timing, referencing past bubbles like the dot-com era where many companies, despite visionary potential, failed due to excessive valuations (e.g., Pets.com, Cisco).
• Companies like Nvidia, Microsoft, and Alphabet are presented as current AI players with established businesses, differentiating them from speculative startups.
• The piece advises investors to exercise discipline, learn from historical cycles, and understand that waiting for a better entry point is a valid strategy, not necessarily missing out on opportunities.
news.Keywords: AI, valuation, market timing, investment discipline, historical cycles

news.Title: 1 Reason to Buy Chainlink (LINK) Right Now -- and 1 Reason to Wait
news.Content: LINK (CRYPTO: LINK) isn't a typical cryptocurrency. Unlike many other cryptocurrencies that run on blockchains, LINK is the native token of the Chainlink oracle network. Oracle networks fetch and deliver real-world data -- such as weather reports, stock tickers, sports scores, and shipping data -- to developer-oriented blockchains like Ethereum ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Chainlink (LINK) is an oracle network token that provides real-world data to blockchains, supporting decentralized applications.
• A reason to buy LINK is its potential to become the backbone for blockchain transactions requiring real-time external data, with partnerships in major financial institutions.
• A reason to wait is LINK's volatility, which could lead financial partners to prefer stablecoins, potentially reducing LINK's importance or making it obsolete.
• The article suggests a cautious approach, recommending small initial investments ('nibbling') rather than a large commitment until volatility subsides.
news.Keywords: cryptocurrency, oracle network, decentralized applications, volatility, stablecoins

news.Title: Better Nuclear Energy Stock: Nano Nuclear Energy vs. Oklo
news.Content: Oklo (NYSE: OKLO) and Nano Nuclear Energy (NASDAQ: NNE) are early-stage nuclear companies pursuing a similar ambition: How to shrink the nuclear power plant from a sprawling concrete behemoth into something that can fit much closer to the customers who actually need the power. In this regard, Oklo ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Oklo and Nano Nuclear Energy are early-stage nuclear companies focused on smaller, modular reactor designs.
• Oklo is favored due to a larger customer pipeline, including tech giants like Meta Platforms and data center developers, and a stronger balance sheet with $2.5 billion in cash.
• Nano Nuclear Energy has secured a small revenue stream ($7 million annually) from an acquisition and has partnerships, including one with Super Micro Computer.
• Both companies are speculative and cash-burning, but Oklo's early support and financial position suggest better long-term growth potential.
news.Keywords: nuclear energy, modular reactors, customer pipeline, balance sheet, speculative investment

news.Title: Former Tesla AI data trainers deliver crucial message on robotaxis
news.Content: Tesla ( TSLA ) permabull Cathie Wood is all in on Full Self-Driving (Supervised), calling it the " most impactful AI project out there " while predicting that FSD would drive Tesla to a $2,000-per-share valuation by 2027. The Ark Invest CEO isn't the only one with high hopes for FSD. Tesla CEO Elon Musk has also touted the tech as the company's most important future-facing project (along with humanoid robots) and Wall Street analysts like Deutsche Bank say investors should focus "more attention... towards the company's robotaxi expansion efforts," and less towards its auto business, which it expects to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Despite bullish predictions for Tesla's Full Self-Driving (FSD) and robotaxi technology, former AI data trainers express skepticism about its viability.
• These trainers report that FSD still struggles with basic maneuvers, and human intervention is heavily relied upon to make the AI appear more capable.
• The fixes implemented by human workers are difficult to scale to the millions of vehicles Tesla envisions for autonomous operation.
• The reliance on cameras and AI, rather than extensive manual mapping like competitors (e.g., Waymo), poses challenges for widespread, reliable autonomy.

The IPO will mark the end of SpaceX's private life and the beginning of scrutiny from investors worldwide. How investors receive the SpaceX IPO will be a huge deal for the artificial intelligence (AI) trade and, therefore, a potentially make-or-break day for the entire stock market. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX's upcoming IPO on June 12 is expected to be a significant event for the AI trade and the broader stock market.
• SpaceX is seeking a valuation between $1.75 trillion and $2 trillion, with revenue growth of approximately 33% in 2025.
• The IPO's reception will be a test for AI stock valuations and the substantial capital expenditures in the sector.
• The AI trade remains critical to the market, with major tech companies and memory stocks heavily influencing indices like the S&P 500.
• SpaceX's focus on sovereign AI and its potential integration with Tesla and xAI add another layer of complexity to its market debut.
news.Keywords: IPO valuation, AI trade, market sentiment, capital expenditures, sovereign AI

news.Title: Wall St hovers near record highs as Nvidia, tech gains eclipse Iran war anxiety
news.Content: By Medha Singh and Twesha Dikshit June 1 (Reuters) - Wall Street's main indexes stayed near record levels on Monday after oil prices spiked on mounting skepticism that a deal to end the three-month-old U.S.-Iran war could be reached soon, ‌while Nvidia's latest AI push kept losses in check. Heavyweight Nvidia rose 3.9% after unveiling a new chip ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia's new AI chip for laptops, developed with Microsoft, boosted its stock by 3.9% and Microsoft's by 2.5%.
• PC makers Dell and HP saw significant gains of 9% and 7.3% respectively, driven by AI optimism and new product announcements.
• The broader market showed mixed reactions in semiconductor stocks, with Qualcomm down 6.7% and Micron up 5.7%.
• Geopolitical tensions related to the Iran conflict are causing oil prices to rise, creating market anxiety despite tech sector strength.

news.Keywords: AI, semiconductors, geopolitical risk, tech stocks, market sentiment

news.Title: 3 Nuclear Stocks Worth Buying as the World Scrambles for Reliable Power
news.Content: Two decades ago, nuclear energy seemed, according to conventional wisdom, to be the product of the bygone Atomic Age. Today, nuclear energy has reemerged as potentially one of the most important power sources of the artificial intelligence (AI) era. It can be hard, however, to separate fact from fiction, especially when many of the stocks trading today seem driven by speculation and narrative rather than fundamentals. Some of the nuclear stocks I'm about to name ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nuclear energy is re-emerging as a significant power source for the AI era.
• Cameco, a major uranium provider, is highlighted for its role in supplying fuel for nuclear power.
• Nano Nuclear Energy is developing small nuclear reactors and focusing on HALEU fuel.
• Oklo is also developing small nuclear reactors and has potential customer interest from companies like Meta and Equinix.

news.Keywords: nuclear energy, uranium supply, small modular reactors, AI power demand, long-term investment

news.Title: Better Memory Chip Stock: Sandisk vs. Micron
news.Content: Memory chips are a major market opportunity right now. There is huge demand and little supply, so the price of memory chips is soaring. That allows memory chip producers like Sandisk (NASDAQ: SNDK) and Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) to cash in on the rise, and both of them have done just that -- and then some. But which is the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Both Sandisk and Micron are benefiting from soaring memory chip prices due to high demand and low supply.
• Sandisk focuses on NAND memory, while Micron produces both NAND and DRAM; DRAM faces greater price volatility and supply crunch.
• Sandisk is projected to have higher revenue growth, with analysts expecting 330% over the next two quarters and 117% for fiscal 2027.
• Micron's revenue growth is expected to be around 250-260% over the next two quarters and 57% for fiscal 2027.
• Sandisk is considered the better investment due to its less volatile exposure to the NAND market and stronger growth projections compared to Micron's higher leverage to the cyclical DRAM market.
news.Keywords: memory market, NAND vs DRAM, revenue growth, stock comparison, investment thesis

news.AI_Summary:

• Market skepticism regarding synergies and the difficulty of 'mergers of equals' add to the uncertainty of such a complex transaction.

• 本週有多場重要科技展會及股東會，預期 AI 題材將持續受市場關注。

news.Title: 3 Top AI Stocks to Buy in June
news.Content: June is here, and there are plenty of artificial intelligence (AI) stocks that have had an incredible year so far. Still, there are several worth buying this month, and I can think of three that look like excellent buys. At the top of my shopping list are Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) , Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) , and Nebius (NASDAQ: NBIS) . All three of ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia, Meta Platforms, and Nebius are highlighted as top AI stocks to buy in June.
• Nvidia's stock has lagged year-to-date (up ~15%) but is expected to rally due to strong GPU demand and data center CapEx growth, with revenue up 85% YoY.
• Meta Platforms (down ~4% YTD) shows strong revenue growth (33% YoY) driven by AI improvements in its ad business and appears undervalued.
• Nebius is a high-growth company (revenue up 684% YoY) operating data centers for AI computing, with strong future revenue growth expected.
• The article suggests these companies are well-positioned for significant returns through 2026 and beyond due to insatiable AI demand.
news.Keywords: AI stocks, growth investing, market leaders, revenue growth, valuation

news.Content:

• 今年在 AI 熱潮帶動下，台股今年來已大漲超過萬點，市場對端午行情格外期待。
• 統一投信認為 AI 產業持續推升企業獲利與市場資金動能，整體多頭架構未變。

news.Title: Wall Street futures gain as AI advances overshadow US-Iran tensions
news.Content: June 1 (Reuters) - U.S. stock index futures climbed on Monday, starting June on a firm footing, as the latest AI push from Nvidia and Microsoft ‌lifted shares, even as uncertainty over the Middle East war lingered. Nvidia rose ...
news.AI_Summary:
• U.S. stock index futures climbed, boosted by AI advancements from Nvidia and Microsoft, despite Middle East tensions.
• Nvidia's new AI chip for laptops and desktops, a result of a partnership with Microsoft, led to a 1.6% premarket gain for NVDA and a 2.8% gain for MSFT.
• Competitors AMD and Intel saw declines of 3.4% and 2.9%, respectively.
• Rising oil prices due to U.S.-Iran conflict concerns are a headwind, while investors await key economic data, including the jobs report.
• Broadcom earnings are also a focus this week, with traders pricing in a high chance of a Fed rate hike by year-end.
news.Keywords: AI push, market sentiment, semiconductor stocks, geopolitical risk, economic data

news.Title: Uncle Sam Is Buying Into Quantum Computing Stocks. Should You?
news.Content: With the U.S. government recently making a $2 billion total investment in nine quantum computing companies, some investors who've been sitting on the sidelines are no doubt wondering whether they're missing out. The share prices of IBM (NYSE: IBM) , IonQ (NYSE: IONQ) , D-Wave (NYSE: QBTS) , and Rigetti Computing (NASDAQ: RGTI) all jumped on the news, each of them having received a sizable portion of that $2 billion investment -- with half going to IBM alone. Missed Nvidia in 2009? This ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The U.S. government is investing $2 billion in nine quantum computing companies, including IBM, IonQ, D-Wave, and Rigetti Computing, with IBM receiving half.
• While the quantum computing market is growing with increased adoption and significant deals, many pure-play companies like IonQ and Rigetti are experiencing substantial revenue growth but also significant losses.
• IBM is the only company on the list with positive adjusted EBITDA, while others are burning cash, indicating a high-risk investment profile.
• Nvidia is indirectly involved by releasing open-source AI models to improve error correction in quantum computers, though it does not develop quantum computers itself.
news.Keywords: quantum computing, government investment, emerging technology, market growth, profitability concerns

news.Title: Warren Buffett's Successor, Greg Abel, Started His Tenure With a Bang by Dumping Amazon and More Than Tripling Berkshire's Stake in a Virtual Monopoly
news.Content: The trillion-dollar company that Warren Buffett helped build, Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRKA) (NYSE: BRKB) , entered uncharted territory in 2026. With the Oracle of Omaha retiring from the CEO role on Dec. 31, Berkshire has a new boss for the first time in well over half a century. Buffett's successor, Greg Abel, hasn't wasted any time making his ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Berkshire Hathaway's new CEO, Greg Abel, sold its entire stake in Amazon, which had rallied significantly since 2019, likely for profit-taking and due to Amazon's P/E ratio of 32.
• Abel more than tripled Berkshire's stake in Alphabet (Google), making it a top-five holding, attracted by its dominant search market share (89-93%) and strong growth in Google Cloud (up 63% YoY).
• Alphabet is seen as a 'virtual monopoly' in search and a pivotal AI player, with its cloud services growing rapidly and integrating generative AI capabilities.
• The move signals Abel's focus on value investing and concentrating assets in high-conviction ideas, contrasting Amazon's valuation with Alphabet's more attractive P/E ratio.
news.Keywords: portfolio management, value investing, market dominance, AI integration, capital allocation

• 外資大舉買超368.02億元，成為推升盤勢主要買盤，法人合計買超367.41億元，顯示資金偏多。
news.Keywords: 台股,AI概念股,記憶體,法人買盤,新高價

news.Title: 黃仁勳GTC宣告啟動AI代理人新時代　感謝台灣供應鏈
news.Content: （中央社記者吳家豪台北2026年6月1日電）輝達（NVIDIA）執行長黃仁勳今天發表GTC Taipei大會主題演講，擘劃人工智慧（AI）產業的嶄新藍圖，除了宣布專為運行AI代理人而生的次世代Vera Rubin平台已全 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 輝達執行長黃仁勳宣布次世代Vera Rubin平台已全面投產，並將輝達重新定位為「基礎設施公司」。
• 輝達攜手聯發科(2454)、台積電(2330)等台廠及微軟，推出採用台積電3奈米製程的N1X晶片，用於RTX Spark系列筆記型電腦。
• 黃仁勳感性向台灣供應鏈150家合作夥伴致謝，強調合作的重要性。
• RTX Spark筆電將運行裝置端AI Agent，並拓展至機器人、衛星、智慧工廠等領域。
• 輝達推出適用於自駕車的Alpamayo 2 Super開放式推理模型，推動Level 4自動駕駛技術開發。
news.Keywords: AI Agent,基礎設施公司,晶片合作,供應鏈,自動駕駛

news.Title: Could SpaceX IPO Be Bad News for Tesla Investors?
news.Content: For years, Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) gave investors the closest thing Wall Street had to a direct bet on Elon Musk's futuristic vision. If investors wanted exposure to artificial intelligence (AI), self-driving cars, humanoid robots, and bold technological ambition, they bought Tesla stock. But the planned SpaceX initial public offering (IPO) could completely change that dynamic. At first glance, a SpaceX IPO sounds like good news for Musk's investors. SpaceX has become one of the world's most valuable private companies, thanks to its rocket launches, Starlink satellite business, and growing role in global communications infrastructure. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• A potential SpaceX IPO could divert investor attention and capital away from Tesla stock, as SpaceX operates in high-growth sectors like rockets, satellite internet (Starlink), and defense.
• SpaceX could command a valuation approaching or exceeding $1.5 trillion, potentially attracting significant investor enthusiasm with a faster growth narrative than Tesla.
• Conversely, a SpaceX IPO could strengthen Tesla's long-term narrative by highlighting the interconnectedness of Elon Musk's companies within a broader AI and technology ecosystem.
• Governance concerns may arise regarding Musk's simultaneous leadership of multiple companies, potentially leading to questions about fair value in inter-company partnerships and divided attention.
news.Keywords: IPO impact, capital diversion, ecosystem synergy, corporate governance, investor sentiment

news.Title: 黃仁勳宣布Vera Rubin量產 推升台股供應鏈再寫天價

news.Keywords: AI超級電腦,供應鏈,量產,股價創新高,法人買盤

news.Title: 高通：5年詞元需求將激增40倍　是AI新貨幣
news.Content: （中央社記者張建中台北2026年6月1日電）高通（Qualcomm）總裁暨執行長艾蒙（Cristiano R.Amon）今天於COMPUTEX主題演講一開場，就對台積電 (23 ...
news.AI_Summary:

• AI發展將達到驚人規模，所有設備都將成為數位體驗的中心，代理AI不會被單一生態系統限制。
• AI將分布在雲端和裝置上，需要強大且節能的CPU編排任務，以及節能且運算密度高的NPU和GPU運行模型。
• 汽車、機器人、工業系統也將成為AI的重要應用領域，對延遲和安全性要求高。

news.Content: With shares up 141% year-to-date, Advanced Micro Devices ( NASDAQ:AMD ) has been on a monster AI-driven run, with gains coming thick and fast. However, for those who think the stock has become too hot to touch, one investor, who goes by the nom de plume Infinity Curve (IC), argues it may be time to reconsider that assumption. Claim 55% Off TipRanks Unlock ...

news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者劉居全報導】美股有所表現，不過外資對亞股的態度卻是讓亞股幾家歡樂幾家愁，玉山投信指出，上週表現最吸金的為台股，單週獲得超過52億美元資金挹注，其次為印度的2.8億美元，其他亞股則呈現資金淨流出，其中南韓失血 ...
news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: 鴻華先進導入聯發科C-X1平台 打造次世代智慧移動座艙
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-06-01 16:49:08 新聞中心 發佈

聯發科(2454)今(1)日宣布，與鴻海(2317)集團旗下的鴻華先進-創(2258)策略合作，攜手加速AI賦能智慧汽車的創新演進。在此次的全球長期合作，策略合作夥伴生態系之高階車種將導入整合NVIDIA先進GPU與AI技術的聯發科天璣汽車座艙平台C-X1，致力為使用者打造安全可靠且具備強大AI算力的智慧座艙體驗。

此次合作突顯汽車產業正加速邁向AI定義汽車、AI賦能的汽車架構，進而帶動對高階運算與生態系整合的強勁需求。同時，也將結合三方在半導體創新、AI基礎設施、車用平台與先進製造領域之優勢，以加速推動具備高度擴展性的解決方案，攜手迎向次世代智慧移動新紀元。

聯發科天璣汽車座艙平台C-X1採用3奈米先進製程，並結合NVIDIA之深厚的GPU、AI、以及圖像技術，以驅動AI賦能的座艙體驗。此外，亦具備直覺的多模態互動能力、支援涵蓋5G車載通訊、Wi-Fi、藍牙等業界領先的通訊技術，同時兼具高效能運算與優質多媒體效能。

該平台整合至鴻華先進的解決方案後，將實現極致流暢的車內體驗，包括直覺式車輛控制、先進安全功能、無縫串聯的娛樂饗宴、為駕駛與乘客提供個人化互動的AI助理，以及打造完整的智慧座艙車載通訊環境。

鴻華先進董事長李秉彥表示：「此次合作結合了我們先進的電動車平台與最佳的AI智慧座艙平台，攜手打造具備高度擴展性的次世代智慧移動解決方案，聚焦於無縫、智慧且以使用者為核心的體驗。透過此合作，鴻華先進亦進一步強化我們持續推出符合市場發展需求之車輛解決方案的承諾。」

聯發科副總經理暨車用平台事業部總經理張豫臺表示，天璣汽車C-X1平台持續在全球不同市場取得進展，此次鴻華先進之採用更是聯發科車用領域成長的重要里程碑，並確保全球車廠與Tier 1供應商皆能獲得頂尖的科技與體驗。透過此次策略合作，聯發科整合涵蓋跨運算、通訊、AI領域的領先座艙解決方案，與夥伴攜手形塑次世代智慧移動新紀元。

NVIDIA汽車業務副總裁Rishi Dhall表示：「AI正將汽車轉變為一個能夠預判並適應車內人員需求的動態智慧空間。藉由NVIDIA的加速運算與AI技術，結合聯發科的天璣平台以及鴻華先進在汽車領域的專業優勢，我們正致力為新一代汽車打造安全、功能豐富且愉悅的AI智慧座艙體驗。」

(圖片來源：聯發科)

聯發科瞄準AI汽車世代 已導入195個專案將轉為營收動能

Arm商務長訪通寶；攜手佈局邊緣AI/實體AI新藍海

news.Title: 中信投信：上周韓股單周飆漲8%、台股漲5.8%同步刷新高
news.Content:
【財訊快報／記者劉居全報導】AI科技股持續走強，加上美伊之間戰爭風險淡化，激勵美國三大指數上周再創新高，本周市場聚焦最新就業數據，以及博通財報能否再替AI題材捎來佳績。中國信託投信表示，觀察上周資金流向，新興亞股整體淨流入18.3億美元，其中，台股為主要買超市場，外資買超52.2億美元最多，印度同樣獲外資買超2.8億美元。賣超部分，外資拋售南韓26.4億美元最多，其次為印尼遭外資賣超6.9億美元，越南、菲律賓及泰國，也呈現賣超0.2億至1.8億美元不等。在指數漲跌部分，中國信託投信表示，上周指數表現與資金流向未同步，新興亞股整體上漲4.1%，不過下跌市場多於上漲市場，南韓雖遭外資拋售，但單周上漲8%，今年以來南韓漲幅達109.46%表現最強，而台股上漲5.8%，泰國上漲1.9%。下跌部分，菲律賓下跌3.2%較重、印度、越南、印尼也有0.6%至0.8%不等的跌幅。

油價與美股市場觀察，中國信託科技趨勢多重資產基金經理人楊士醇表示，美伊衝突對市場影響逐步淡化，荷姆茲海峽近期船舶通行狀況出現回升跡象，不過，要恢復到正常運量恐需要時間，預期高油價仍將對市場造成影響。

另一方面，楊士醇認為，AI浪潮引領新興科技產業投資積極加碼布局，全球經濟及美股要出現放緩機率相對偏低，加上金融市場榮景帶動財富效果，有助支撐消費穩定，在今年美股企業獲利基本面佳的預期下，股市維持中性偏多看待，惟須注意漲多的個股面臨評價回調的風險。

聯準會升降息觀察，楊士醇指出，全球能源高漲，市場持續籠罩通膨上揚的不確定環境，當前部分國家貨幣政策開始趨緊，楊士醇表示，考量總體環境在溫和增長加上通膨黏性，聯準會今年的貨幣政策可能從原本預期降息2碼，調整為維持政策利率為3.5至3.75%維持中性看待，投資操作上回歸個股基本面。

越南市場觀察，中國信託越南機會基金經理人張晨瑋表示，五月胡志明指數在大型企業、VIN集團以及國有銀行等大型權值股的多頭引領下，刷下歷史新高來到1,927點，但隨後出現獲利賣壓，盤勢陷入震盪，今年前五個月漲幅4.43%。隨著市場不確定性逐漸明朗，包括：新屆政府人事底定、戰事干擾淡化，以及市場升級利多消息，加上越南基本面保持強勁，有望進一步推升越南股市估值。

張晨瑋表示，越南在科技與現代化工業推動日趨積極，總理黎明興日前出席越南科技創新日活動的戰略部屬會議，針對具體化推動科技創新與國家數位化轉型提出方針。黎明興強調，越南將透過建立科技創新生態圈，以及加強國際合作等重點任務，力爭於2030年實現現代化工業國家、2045年晉升已開發與高收入國家之列。

張晨瑋補充，值得留意的是，越南擬釋出大型國企股權 吸引國際資金與轉型市場結構，根據越南國家證券委員會消息，由於越南國營企業的改革進展落後於原先規劃進程，為因應此情況，官方正計畫釋出大型國營企業股權，希望能藉此吸引國際投資人並提升公司治理品質。此外，當局亦認為該策略是越南吸引外資與市場轉型的關鍵，盼進一步提升市場透明度，活絡證券交易市場之交易熱度。

news.Title: 00981A除息日6/16；台股仍有機會震盪向上
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-06-01 16:42:57 新聞中心 發佈

近期台股表現強勢，市場交投熱絡，產業呈現健康輪動，帶動投資人對股市前景的信心。統一投信投研團隊表示，台灣強勁的經濟成長成為股市最堅實的後盾，且4月製造業PMI創下四年多以來最快增速。受惠AI伺服器與半導體的拉貨動能，台灣出口年增率已連續30個月成長。基本面穩健，使今(2026)年台股因非基本面因素影響而短線拉回時，投資人承接意願仍偏正向，並促成股市V型反轉。

統一投信投研團隊表示，近期市場焦點高度集中在AI產業的發展驗證，從AI代理人生態系持續發展，及AI巨頭們亮眼的財報及展望，皆確立了AI基礎建設需求正從四大雲端服務商，擴散至主權AI與更廣泛的企業客戶，整體產業鏈蓬勃發展。此一趨勢不僅鞏固了台灣在全球供應鏈的核心地位，更意味著AI的長期成長故事遠未結束，使台股仍有機會震盪向上。

統一投信指出，主動統一台股增長(00981A；基金之配息來源可能為收益平準金)第二次除息的收益分配期前公告已經出爐，本次配息時程及每單位預估配息金額，皆已揭露於統一投信官網，估計每單位擬配息0.63元，實際配息金額則預計6月12日公布，並將於6月16日除息，投資人參與本次配息的最後買進日為6月15日，配息收益預估於7月9日到帳。

主動統一台股增長為季配息，保管銀行為彰化銀行(2801)。統一投信表示，若將配息帳戶設定為彰化銀行，還可免除10元跨行匯款手續費，讓配息完整入帳。

統一投信提醒，主動式ETF與被動式ETF並無絕對的優劣，主動式ETF不保證能超越績效指標、市場大盤或被動式ETF的報酬，且過去績效也不代表未來績效的保證。投資人投資前應審慎評估市場波動與各項投資風險，並詳閱公開說明書，根據自身的投資目標與風險承受度選擇最適合的產品。

統一投信提醒，投資人可以觀察相關金融市場的政經議題變化，作為投資布局時的參考依據。選擇ETF及參與配息時，需留意基金過去配息不代表未來配息，基金配息率亦不代表實際報酬率。金融商品的淨值有可能因各項總經或產業因素變化而上下波動，ETF除息後，配息金額也會從淨值扣除，使淨值出現較大變動。

news.Title: Should You Buy Snowflake Stock After Its Recent Surge? The Answer Might Surprise You.
news.Content: Large organizations typically use more than one cloud provider to run their operations, because it gives them more flexibility and minimizes disruptions if one suffers an outage. That means their valuable data is often spread across different platforms like Microsoft Azure and Amazon Web Services, which creates technical challenges. Snowflake 's (NYSE: SNOW) Data Cloud enables organizations to aggregate all of their information no matter where it is stored, so they can analyze it more effectively and extract any valuable insights. Unified ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Snowflake's Data Cloud enables organizations to unify data across multiple cloud providers for analysis and AI model deployment.
• The company experienced strong demand for its AI products, with product revenue reaching $1.33 billion in Q1 FY2027, a 34% YoY increase, exceeding forecasts and leading to an upward revision of full-year guidance.
• Despite revenue acceleration, Snowflake reported a GAAP net loss of $295.5 million in Q1 FY2027, driven by increased R&D and marketing spending, though it was profitable on an adjusted (non-GAAP) basis.
• High stock-based compensation costs ($433.6 million in Q1) continue to be a factor, potentially diluting existing shareholders, and Wall Street analysts show limited upside potential.
news.Keywords: data cloud, AI platform, revenue acceleration, profitability concerns, stock-based compensation

news.Title: Nvidia Enters Windows Laptop Market, Taking On Intel and AMD
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Nvidia Corp. is entering the PC market with a new chip aimed at loosening the stranglehold of Intel Corp. technology in that arena and modernizing the machines for the AI era. Most Read from Bloomberg US Says Deals With Iran for Safe Hormuz Transit Are Prohibited Strait of Hormuz Ship Transits Are Rising Thanks to US Help Berkshire Hathaway to Buy Taylor Morrison for $6.8 Billion A Rare ‘Super’ El Niño Is Looking More Likely. Here’s What to Expect Americans Injured in Iranian Missile Strike on Kuwaiti Air Base Starting ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia is entering the PC market with its new RTX Spark Superchip, designed for AI workloads and targeting Intel and AMD's dominance in laptops and desktops.

• Nvidia's entry leverages its strength in data centers and aims to offer powerful, thin, and light machines, potentially shaking up the PC arena similar to the smartphone's advent.

news.Title: Buckle Up! The Federal Reserve's May Inflation Forecast Points to Fireworks on Wall Street.
news.Content: It's a great time to be an investor on Wall Street. As of the closing bell on May 27, the Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJINDICES: ^DJI) , S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) , and Nasdaq Composite (NASDAQINDEX: ^IXIC) were at all-time highs. Wall Street's historic rally has been powered by the evolution of artificial intelligence (AI), record share ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The stock market has reached all-time highs, driven by AI, corporate earnings, and IPOs, but faces potential headwinds from inflation.
• The Federal Reserve Bank of Cleveland's latest inflation forecast indicates a worsening trend, with the trailing 12-month estimate rising to 4.18% in May.
• Geopolitical events, such as the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, have impacted energy prices, contributing to inflation concerns that could affect transportation and production costs.
• With a hawkish new Fed Chair, higher interest rates are likely to suppress inflation, potentially stymying debt financing for AI data center build-outs and impacting market valuations.
news.Keywords: inflation forecast, monetary policy, geopolitical risk, market valuation, interest rate sensitivity

news.Title: Nvidia Stock Split: 2 Years After, Could Nvidia Stock Reach $1,000 Again?
news.Content: An important anniversary is right around the corner: Just about two years ago, Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) completed a major stock split, bringing its shares down from more than $1,000 to about $100. Since that time, the world's most-watched artificial intelligence (AI) company has seen its shares advance 75% -- and they now trade for about $215. What's pushed the stock along this path? Investors remain eager to get in on shares of ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia's stock has risen 75% in the two years following its 10-for-1 stock split, trading at approximately $215.
• The company continues to lead the AI chip market and has expanded its offerings with related tools and services.
• Revenue growth has accelerated, with the latest quarter showing an 85% increase to $81 billion, and a 95% increase is projected for the next quarter.
• Nvidia is set to launch its Vera Rubin platform in Q3, aiming to dominate the CPU market and maintain its GPU leadership.
• A $1,000 stock price would imply a market capitalization exceeding $24 trillion, representing 35% of the S&P 500.
news.Keywords: stock split, AI dominance, revenue acceleration, market capitalization, future outlook

news.Content:
輝達執行長 黃仁勳 1日演講中提到AI PC時代的來臨，華碩、宏碁等品牌筆電股連續2天漲停，台股也創新高來到45337.91點。（攝影／鄭國強）

台股 1 日在輝達執行長黃仁勳演講的帶動之下，AI族群一馬當先，台積電（2330）一度漲到2415元，聯發科（2454）大漲245元，鴻海（2317）早盤突破300元大關，使得加權指數一度要站上4萬6千點，盤中最高來到45931.1點。

可惜最後台積電收平盤2355元，權值股台達電（2308）紅翻黑，台光電（2383）也是紅翻黑，最後台股收盤仍漲604.97點，收在45337.91點，創下歷史新高，成交量1.47兆元。

台股一度要到4萬6千點，但仍創新高收在45337點

三大法人買超367.4億元，其中外資買超368億元，自營商賣超65億元，投信買超64.4億元。

台積電雖然盤中大漲2415元，但最後收在平盤2355元。好幾檔主動式ETF持股的台光電早盤一度大漲160元，來到5280元，沒想到黃仁勳都還沒開始演講多久，股價由紅翻黑，最後小跌0.98%，下跌50元，收在5070元。

CPU是今年黃仁勳少數強調的重點，世界先進（5347）的股價率先反映，大漲6.55%，上漲11元，收在179元。聯電（2303）盤中確實大漲8%，一度上攻到155.5元，但最後收盤僅漲1.04%，收在146元，成交量達28萬張。

黃仁勳演講帶動AIPC股，華碩 、 宏碁 、 仁寶都漲停

品牌筆電大廠華碩（2357）、宏碁（2353）受到AI PC、和AI代理人話題的激勵，華碩開盤即漲停，大漲76元收在837元，很罕見的連續2個交易日漲停。宏碁也難的連續2天漲停，收在38.7元。

仁寶（2324）也是漲停，收在40.35元，微星（2377）差一點收在漲停，但仍大漲8%，收在141.5元。技嘉（2376）也上漲4.59%，收在387元，創2024年3月以來新高價。

黃仁勳在演講時提到記憶體，記憶體族群卻呈現兩極化的走勢，群聯（8299）氣勢如虹，一度離漲停價只差5元，來到2825元，但收盤漲幅剩7.57%，收在2770元。傳出

news.Title: U.S. to close loophole allowing advanced chips to Chinese firms, Reuters says
news.Content: The U.S. Department of Commerce has moved to close a potential loophole it created that may have allowed companies to export ...
news.AI_Summary:
• US Department of Commerce is moving to close a loophole that may have allowed advanced AI chips from Nvidia and AMD to be exported to Chinese entities outside of China.
• The loophole might have facilitated the export of Nvidia's Rubin and Blackwell processors, as well as AMD's MI350 chips.
• This guidance suggests these AI chips may have been reaching subsidiaries of Chinese AI firms for nearly a year.
• The move aims to prevent advanced chip technology from reaching entities that could use it for military or strategic purposes.
news.Keywords: export controls, AI chips, China, loophole, national security

news.Title: 台積電帶動GDP狂飆！ 韓媒揭殘酷真相：年輕世代慘淪「乞丐超人」
news.Content:
台灣在人工智慧（AI）與半導體產業帶動下，近年 經濟 表現亮眼，不僅經濟成長率屢創新高，人均GDP更有望突破4萬美元，台股市值也躍升全球前五大市場。然而，南韓媒體近日卻以「台灣病」與「乞丐超人」現象為題，剖析台灣經濟榮景背後的隱憂，認為財富集中與世代落差問題正日益浮現。

根據韓媒《東亞日報》報導，台灣今年第一季經濟成長率達13.69%，創下近40年來單季最高紀錄，遠高於南韓同期表現。受惠於AI浪潮及半導體出口爆發式成長，以台積電為首的科技產業成為推升經濟的重要引擎，台股近年漲勢凌厲，市值更陸續超越加拿大與印度。

不過，亮眼的總體經濟數據卻未必反映在全民生活感受上。報導引述民調指出，仍有超過半數民眾認為當前經濟狀況不佳，顯示經濟成長與民眾體感之間出現落差。

韓媒分析，半導體產業雖貢獻台灣超過兩成GDP，但相關從業人口不到全體勞工3%。即使將範圍擴大至整體資訊科技製造業，受惠人口依然有限，導致多數服務業與傳統產業勞工難以共享AI紅利。

此外，高房價與高租金問題也成為年輕世代沉重負擔。報導指出，台北市房價所得比已超過15倍，不少社會新鮮人每月薪資有近半數需支付房租，居住壓力居高不下。

韓媒特別關注近年在台灣網路流傳的「乞丐超人」現象，意指一群透過手機App追蹤便利商店即期品折扣資訊、專門搶購打折鮮食的年輕族群。這個帶有自嘲意味的稱呼，反映部分年輕人在高物價與高房價環境下，必須精打細算過生活的現實處境。

報導認為，台灣並非缺乏經濟成長，而是面臨成長果實分配不均的挑戰。當半導體產業持續創造全球矚目的經濟奇蹟之際，如何縮小貧富差距、改善居住正義與提升年輕世代的發展機會，恐將成為台灣未來必須正視的重要課題。

（封面圖／台積電提供）

news.Title: 美伊戰事以來台股基金這2檔強漲逾80% 統一投信2檔擠進前五
news.Content:
美伊戰爭開戰以來已達三個月，但台股逆風上漲，台股基金普遍亦有不錯表現。根據資料統計，截至上周五 (5/29) 台股基金中，近三個月績效排行前五名台股基金，施羅德台灣樂活中小基金及統一中小基金以高達 80% 奪下冠亞軍，值得注意的是，統一投信囊括兩席，統一龍馬基金以 72% 績效登第三，展現團隊基金操作實力。

根據 CMoeny 統計，截至上周五 (5/29) 台股基金中，近三個月績效排行前五名包含：施羅德台灣樂活中小基金、統一中小基金、統一龍馬基金、元大經貿基金、摩根新興科技基金。其中，統一投信就有兩檔入榜，分別是統一中小基金、統一龍馬基金，績效分別為 80.95%、72.54%，顯現團隊在選股與掌握產業趨勢的實力。

統一投信台股投研團隊表示，隨著四大雲端服務供應商 (CSP) 資本支出前景正向、AI 基礎建設投資動能延續，加上市場對 Google 自研 AI 晶片 (TPU)2027 年出貨量的樂觀預期，進一步帶動台股 AI 零組件、晶片設計等供應鏈穩健成長趨勢，正向樂觀看待台股後市表現。

投資操作上，統一投信台股投研團隊建議，除主流 AI 題材外，亦可持續關注如：功率元件、矽晶圓及被動元件等具備漲價潛力且評價相對低檔之族群。面對台股高檔震盪格局則建議，可伺機逢低布局，並採取定期定額方式優選基金標的，掌握中長期獲利成長機會。

news.Title: 台股這麼強追高還會虧？ 專家揭關鍵：創高是靠輪動
news.Content:
台股今（1）日上漲604點，加權指數衝破4萬5來到45931點，距離4萬6僅一步之遙，不過財經專家狄驤表示，有投資人向他訴苦，追高後，讓數日甚至一個月以上的獲利瞬間回吐，他回應，實際上台股的創高是靠資金輪動來達成，因此不追高乖離是重要的。

狄驤提到，目前台股與季線乖離已經飆到21%，乖離率算是大得很誇張，他追蹤的過熱指標已經全數亮燈，因此他近期已經逢高賣掉約1/3的持股，剩下的低成本部位將續抱參與行情。

狄驤表示，雖然最近台股表現亮眼，但也有不少投資朋友詢問，他們不小心追高後，讓數日甚至一個月以上的獲利瞬間回吐。「這聽起來很矛盾，台股這麼強，追高還會虧損？」他說，實際上台股的創高是靠資金輪動來達成，這意味著每隔一段時間，部分族群就會被被主力輪流倒貨，像是今天的功率元件就變成重災區，因此不追高乖離是重要的。

狄驤說明，乖離率過大的個股並非不會續漲，只是在沒有低成本優勢的情況下再介入，碰到漲多拉回，以及自己受不了恐慌殺低的可能性也會大增，這也是他開始逢高減碼持股的原因，目的就是在低風險參與市場的同時，還能保有銀彈靈活應對。

狄驤指出，他並不是看空台股，也不會放空台股，但在趨勢向上的過程中，偶爾還是會遇到高風險時期，因此需持續控制風險讓自己能順利的待在市場參與行情；如果對目前的驚驚漲行情感到恐懼，不知道該如何減碼或進場加碼，不妨以考量風險為第一步，並且分批進行，這樣做就可以讓自己好睡很多，也不用擔心被市場波動甩下車。

（封面圖／東森新聞）

news.Title: 高通也要進軍資料中心 執行長艾蒙認證：台積電及台灣供應鏈非常重要
news.Content:
高通（Qualcomm）執行長艾蒙（Cristiano Amon）1日在台北國際電腦展（COMPUTEX 2026）發表主題演講，並指出2026年將正式成為「智慧體（Agent）元年」，AI已從單純回答指令的工具，演進為能自主採取行動的智慧夥伴；他更預言，未來數位體驗的中心將不再是智慧型手機，而是無處不在的AI智慧體，這項變革將徹底重塑全球行動通訊與運算產業的硬體架構。

艾蒙在演講開頭首先感謝台灣的合作夥伴。他表示，科技的演進從來不是單一公司能獨立完成，而是需要強大的生態系與合作關係。他特別點名台積電（TSMC）是這條創新道路上的卓越夥伴，並向現場的台灣供應商與開發者致謝，強調科技巨頭能取得領先地位，全仰賴這些緊密的夥伴關係。

針對AI的發展，安蒙提出顛覆性的觀點。過去大眾習慣將智慧型手機視為數位生活的中心，所有穿戴式裝置都圍繞著手機生態系運行。然而在智慧體時代，AI智慧體將成為數位體驗的核心，手機、個人電腦（PC）與聯網汽車等裝置，都將轉變為AI智慧體的「端點（Endpoints）」。目前全球有高達60億支手機、20億台個人AI裝置、20億台PC以及5億輛聯網汽車，這些龐大的裝置基礎，未來都將成為AI智慧體運行的載體，且智慧體將不再受限於單一生態系。

艾蒙強調，現有的裝置多半是為了「由用戶啟動行為」而設計，並不符合未來智慧體的運行需求。AI智慧體具備自主性，需要24小時不間斷運作，並在不同裝置間無縫銜接。這意味著新一代裝置必須具備更強大的中央處理器（CPU）來編排任務，以及高運算密度的神經處理器（NPU）和圖形處理器（GPU）來運行本地模型。在功耗與延遲的嚴格限制下，高通憑藉在行動領域累積的低功耗運算優勢，能提供從微瓦級耳機到千瓦級資料中心的全面解決方案。

在生態系合作方面，高通目前與業界展開深度合作。包含OpenCopilot與Hermes等任務編排器已在驍龍（Snapdragon）平台上運行，Google也將生成式AI智慧體直接布署至Android系統中。此外，微軟、Perplexity、Humane等企業也正與高通聯手研發全面性的智慧體作業系統。數據顯示，當導入分布式AI架構、由本地裝置分擔雲端運算時，程式開發的工作負載可減少高達60％的代幣（Token）消耗；在網頁生成任務中，更能省下30％的代幣，並降低4倍的成本。

除了個人運算，高通也將AI布局延伸至汽車、機器人與工業領域。安蒙在現場展示了汽車AI應動的雙層架構，除了在智慧座艙提供個人化服務，還能透過物理AI結合攝影機、雷達等感測器進行環境感知與自主駕駛。安蒙更前瞻性地提出6G願景，強調6G是第1個為AI時代設計的無線通訊技術，具備連結、分布式運算與感測3大支柱，能將無線訊號轉化為物理AI的輸入來源，建構出即時的數位孿生世界。

演講尾聲，艾蒙投下另一個震撼彈，正式宣布高通推出全新資料中心產品品牌「Dragonfly」，這象徵著高通的多元化布局已從邊緣端全面延伸至雲端基礎設施。高通目前正與全球雲端巨頭密切合作，並預告將在6月24日的投資者日公布更多技術細節。

news.Title: Prediction: After Intel, This Artificial Intelligence (AI) Semiconductor Stock Could be Next to Secure an Investment From the Trump Administration
news.Content: At a recent rally in New York, President Donald Trump spoke warmly about memory-chip maker Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) . He referenced the company's ambitious plans to invest an estimated $200 billion into expanding its domestic chip fabrication capacities over the next several years. More broadly, Trump's remarks reflected his enthusiasm for onshoring U.S. manufacturing. I think this raises an intriguing possibility: The U.S. government could choose to invest in Micron, building on the existing framework of support ...
news.AI_Summary:
• President Trump expressed support for Micron Technology's $200 billion domestic chip fabrication expansion plans.
• The U.S. government may invest in Micron, similar to its support for Intel, aligning with goals of onshoring manufacturing and technological leadership.
• Micron has already received $6.1 billion in funding from the CHIPS Act to support new fabs and facility modernization.
• This government assistance is expected to accelerate the production of next-generation HBM4E chips crucial for AI workloads.
• Increased U.S. government involvement would strengthen domestic supply chains, enhance national security, and potentially lead to more favorable contracts with U.S. customers.
news.Keywords: government investment, CHIPS Act, domestic manufacturing, AI infrastructure, supply chain security

news.Title: 永豐期貨：正價差飆700點，台股五萬點不是夢
news.Content:
【財訊快報／編輯部】指數週一上漲604.97點，收在45337.91點，成交量1.53兆元。台指期上漲726點至46041點，正價差為703.09點。籌碼面部分，三大法人買超367.41億元；而在台指期淨部位方面，三大法人淨空單增加2148口至-13798口，其中外資淨空單增加4023口至-64673口；十大交易人中的特定法人全月份台指期淨空單增加790口至-10678口。今日台股延續強勢上攻氣勢，在Computex題材全面點火之下，市場情緒明顯進入高溫區。更值得注意的是正價差持續擴大，目前已經來到驚人的700點水位，這種規模過去極罕見，代表市場對未來行情的預期已經不是短線樂觀，而是直接開始反映未來數月甚至下半年企業獲利與資金行情。期貨願意用如此高溢價追價，本質上就是大型資金提前卡位，市場正在形成「漲了還要更漲」的正向循環。從盤面來看，今天真正關鍵還是在台積電，雖然盤中一度突破2400元、創下歷史新高附近，但尾盤收平，這其實反而不像轉弱，比較像主力刻意壓節奏。因為只要台積電正式脫離整理區、開始加速噴出，指數空間會瞬間被重新打開。若台積電後續真的如預期挑戰2500甚至2600元，配合權值股全面擴散與追價效應，指數六月底朝五萬點靠攏並不是不可能。

選擇權未平倉量部分，06月買權最大OI落在46000點，賣權最大OI落在20200點；06月W1買權最大OI落在48700點，賣權最大OI落在44000點。全月份未平倉量put/call ratio值由2.22下降至1.71。VIX指數上升0.67至36.54。外資台指期買權淨金額6.19億元；賣權淨金額1.08億元。

news.Title: Uber and Autobrains target Munich for robotaxi rollout
news.Content: BERLIN, June 1 (Reuters) - Uber and Israel-based Autobrains said on Monday ‌they plan to launch ‌a ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Uber and Autobrains plan to launch a robotaxi program in Munich, Germany, in collaboration with Nvidia.
• The program will utilize Uber's mobility network and Autobrains' AI driving system, powered by Nvidia's Drive Hyperion platform.
• Munich is chosen as the first deployment city, aiming to scale autonomous ride-hailing in Europe beyond isolated pilots.
• The initiative seeks to create an OEM-agnostic model for robotaxi services, adaptable to multiple vehicle platforms and urban markets.
news.Keywords: robotaxi, autonomous vehicles, AI driving system, European market, mobility network

news.Title: 《台股盤後》量縮收漲604點、日K連二紅，首收45K
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-06-01 15:36:15 新聞中心 發佈

輝達CEO黃仁勳今(1)日在GTC Taipei的演講，明顯激勵聯發科、電腦及周邊設備類股漲勢，而台股開高後再搭配台塑四寶、金控股如台新新光金、長榮集團的明顯助攻，且29大類股僅電機機械、汽車類股收黑下，雖台積電未能維繫盤中隨日經225指數創高氣勢，終場僅收平盤，加權指數終場仍收在45337.91點、再寫新高，上漲604.97點或1.35%、日K連二紅，成交量縮至1兆4770億元。

美股上週五上漲，三大指數均創新高，主要受到AI相關樂觀情緒再度升溫以及強勁獲利成長所推動，儘管市場仍擔憂伊朗戰爭對通膨與全球經濟造成的衝擊。亞股方面，受惠美股上週五走高，加上權重股軟銀集團(SBG)以及村田製作所等AI相關電子零件廠飆漲，激勵日經225指數今日史上首度衝破6.7萬點大關、刷新盤中新高紀錄，終場上漲0.91%；韓國股市今日也一度衝破8800點，再創歷史新高，KOSPI終場上漲3.68% 。

台積電受上週五ADR收黑影響、盤中一度翻黑，終場仍收在平盤2355元，穩住大盤軍心；而輝達CEO黃仁勳今日在GTC Taipei發表演講，並宣布攜手聯發科推出RTX Spark筆電，激勵聯發科上漲5.68%，並帶動電腦及周邊設備類股漲幅達5.73%，華碩、英業達、仁寶、宏碁、廣達、緯創均亮燈漲停，微星、佳世達、神達等也漲勢凌厲，輔以群創漲停、南亞科漲停、SPACEX概念股則有事欣科接棒上漲5.8%，而央行對AI高估值的示警，也並未澆息買盤追價的信心。

在29大類股表現，南亞、台塑領軍的台塑四寶強勢上漲，添勵塑膠股漲幅達7.79%，表現最亮眼；資訊服務類股亦有7.47%的漲幅、漲幅居次，主要係華經、邁達特、精誠、零壹漲停效應；光電類股在群創、彩晶攻上漲停下，漲幅達5.3%、僅稍落後電腦及周邊設備的上漲5.7%。而在弱勢股部分，電機機械、汽車類股下跌0.61%、0.49%，係唯二下跌的族群。

三大法人動向方面，今日三大法人總計買超367.4億元；其中，外資及陸資(不含外資自營商)買超368.01億元，投信買超64.47億元，自營商賣超65.08億元。

台股焦點：華碩(2357.TW)

華碩攜ROG參展COMPUTEX 秀AI技術與電競創新

news.Title: 外資上週轉買超1650億元　加碼力積電31萬張排第一
news.Content:
（中央社記者曾仁凱台北2026年6月1日電）台股上週持續攻高，週五集中市場指數收在44732.94點，再創收盤指數新高，週漲2464.97點或5.83%。根據台灣證券交易所統計，外資上週在集中市場買超新台幣1650.32億元，終止先前連2賣。

個股方面，外資上週買超前3名上市公司分別為力積電 (6770) 31萬9766張，富邦金 (2881) 18萬5141張，和鴻海 (2317) 17萬4153張。

賣超榜方面，上週外資賣超前3名上市公司為群創 (3481) 30萬1356張，台新新光金 (2887) 24萬9109張，和華南金 (2880) 18萬836張。

另統計今年初至5月29日止，外資累計賣超金額為3493.58億元。外資總持有股票市值為72兆2809億元，占全體上市股票市值比重49.54%。

news.Title: 不只台積電還有輝達！「隱藏版超級AI ETF單月暴賺1.1兆」前4月人均分紅8.12萬贏慘了
news.Content:
受益於AI浪潮帶動台股4月份瘋狂暴漲逾7,200點，勞動基金與新制勞退基金的單月及累計獲利雙雙寫下歷史新高紀錄，整體勞動基金規模8兆3,678億元，4月單月收益數暴賺1兆1,047.8億元，改寫史上單月最高紀錄，前4月累計收益達1兆5,392億元，整體累計收益率衝上20.21％。

新制勞退基金運用規模5兆4,747億元，累計收益率19.73％，累計帳面收益突破兆元，達1兆491.8億元，以目前參與收益分配的有效帳戶1,292萬戶計算，平均每位勞工前4個月的帳面分紅約8.12萬元；勞動基金績效是每日滾動計算的，目前獲利屬於帳面累積，最終的分紅金額必須看115年全年度結算績效才算數。

4月份台灣股市出現歷史罕見的驚人漲勢，單月狂飆超過7,200點，單月漲幅高達22.71％，直接改寫台股歷史紀錄，由於勞動基金有超過4成的資金重倉布局在國內市場，這波台股大噴發成為基金獲利的核心推進器。

勞動基金核心持股高度集中在台灣最具競爭力的科技龍頭，光是台積電（2330）與台達電（2308）兩大巨頭，就聯手掌握了基金近38.3％的國內股票部位，其股價大幅飆升，就為基金貢獻了將近10％獲利報酬。

其他如鴻海（2317）、聯發科（2454）以及散熱題材的奇鋐（3017）與健策（3653）等4檔個股合計占比高達12.84％，AI伺服器供應鏈個股全面噴發，帶來了極為驚人的帳面資本利得，現在新制勞退前十大持股中，AI相關產業鏈包括台積電、台達電、廣達（2382）、台光電（2383）、金像電（2368）等超高含「積」量與純AI權重已逼近60％，勞退基金堪稱「超級AI ETF」。

據勞動基金運用局最新揭露的海外核心持股，它同時也是輝達（NVIDIA）、微軟（Microsoft）、蘋果（Apple）以及亞馬遜（Amazon） 的大股東，等於把「AI核心大腦（美股）」與「AI製造肌肉（台股）」結合在同一個大水庫裡。

勞工跟著這群AI權值股享受「看不到天花板」的暴賺分紅，即便遭遇科技股強烈回檔，勞工個人專戶結算時，政府依法保證絕對不會虧損本金，還會補足至少兩年期定存的利息，該種「獲利共享、風險國家扛」操盤條件，是任何商業投信發行的ETF都無法複製的。

news.Title: AI熱潮撐台股！00981A第二次配息時程出爐　6/16除息
news.Content:
財經中心／王駿凱報導

台股近期在AI題材帶動下持續強勢表態，不只大盤交投熱絡，資金也呈現健康輪動格局。統一投信投研團隊指出，台灣經濟基本面穩健，加上AI伺服器與半導體需求持續爆發，成為支撐台股的重要力量，也讓市場在面對短線震盪時，仍維持偏多氣氛。

統一投信表示，台灣4月製造業PMI創下四年多來最快增速，出口年增率更已連續30個月成長，反映AI供應鏈拉貨動能仍強。隨著AI代理人生態系逐步成形，加上國際AI巨頭財報與展望亮眼，AI基礎建設需求已從四大雲端服務商，進一步擴散至主權AI與企業客戶，帶動整體產業鏈持續擴張。在市場資金持續聚焦AI趨勢下，主動式ETF也成為投資人關注焦點。其中，00981A 主動統一台股增長ETF第二次除息時程正式公告，預計6月16日除息，投資人若想參與本次配息，最後買進日為6月15日，配息則預估於7月9日入帳。網傳配息金額為每股0.63元，但實際配息金額預計6月12日公布。

統一投信表示，00981A為季配息ETF，保管銀行為彰化銀行，若投資人將配息帳戶設定為彰化銀行，還可免除10元跨行匯款手續費，讓配息完整入帳。不過，統一投信也提醒，主動式ETF並不保證能超越大盤或被動式ETF表現，過去績效也不代表未來報酬。投資人在布局ETF時，仍須留意市場波動、總體經濟與產業變化等風險因素，並依自身風險承受度與投資目標審慎評估。此外，投信也提醒，ETF配息率不等於實際報酬率，除息後基金淨值將扣除配息金額，可能出現較大波動，投資人不宜單純以高配息作為投資依據。

《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。

原文出處： AI熱潮撐台股！00981A第二次配息時程出爐 6/16除息

news.Title: AVGO vs. SMCI: Analysts See Upside in One AI Stock, but 24% Downside in the Other
news.Content: Broadcom (AVGO) and Super Micro Computer (SMCI) have both been major beneficiaries of the AI boom, though they play very different roles in the market. Broadcom has benefited from rising demand for AI chips and networking products used in large data centers, while Super Micro has seen strong demand for its AI servers. However, according to the TipRanks comparison tool , Wall Street is currently far more bullish on Broadcom ahead of its June 3 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Analysts are more bullish on Broadcom (AVGO) than Super Micro Computer (SMCI) ahead of Broadcom's earnings report.
• The average analyst price target implies ~7% upside for AVGO, while SMCI faces a potential ~24% downside.
• Broadcom's year-to-date performance is over 29%, driven by demand for its AI chips and networking products; Q2 revenue is projected at $22.12 billion (47% YoY growth).
• Analysts expect Broadcom to report Q2 FY26 EPS of $2.40 (52% YoY growth), with AI revenue projected at $13.6 billion in Q3.
• Super Micro's revenue missed expectations in Q3 FY26 despite 122% YoY growth, with analysts citing margin pressure and execution risks.
news.Keywords: AI stocks, earnings preview, analyst ratings, revenue growth, market sentiment

news.Content: Lemonade (NYSE: LMND) has been a divisive stock over its six years as a public company. While it's demonstrating powerful growth and introducing an artificial intelligence (AI)-driven alternative in a stodgy, traditional industry, does it really have a distinctive edge? And given its ongoing losses, the delightful approach to insurance may not actually ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Lemonade (LMND) is showing improving loss ratios, indicating a move towards profitability in its AI-driven insurance business.
• In-force premium (IFP) grew 32% year-over-year in Q1 2026, and revenue increased by 71%.

news.Title: 台股飆漲少年股神崛起！開戶數衝1433萬新高　連幼兒都提早卡位
news.Content:
【緯來新聞網】台股今年在AI熱潮與資金行情推動下屢創歷史新高，加權指數累計大漲逾萬點，不僅帶動成交量頻頻突破兆元大關，也掀起新一波全民投資熱潮。根據證交所最新統計，截至5月底，台股總開戶人數已達1433萬2896人，單月新增13.2萬戶，再創歷史新高，顯示資本市場吸引力持續升溫。

台股今年以來勢如破竹，累計暴漲破萬點，20至30歲的年輕族群，短短一個月內就暴增4萬多人。（圖／資料照）

從年齡結構觀察，61歲以上族群仍是台股最大主力，開戶數達426萬6823人，占整體近三成；41歲至50歲族群則以267萬9070人排名第二。然而，最受市場關注的焦點並非資深投資人，而是年輕世代加速湧入股市的現象。

統計顯示，20歲至30歲族群5月新增開戶數高達4萬102人，居各年齡層之冠，總開戶數攀升至180萬8798人。31歲至40歲族群也增加2萬4830人，顯示年輕上班族正積極透過ETF、定期定額與零股交易參與市場，投資生態逐漸朝年輕化發展。

另一方面，被市場暱稱為「股市娃娃兵」的0至19歲族群同樣成長驚人，5月新增2萬8358戶，累計開戶數正式突破75萬戶大關、達75萬2643人。市場分析，不少家長近年透過未成年子女帳戶布局ETF、金融股及大型權值股，希望及早建立孩子的理財觀念，也讓未成年投資人口持續攀升。

值得注意的是，過去新開戶主力多集中在30歲以下族群，但隨著台股持續飆漲，今年31歲至60歲族群開戶增速明顯加快，顯示這波資金行情不僅吸引年輕人進場，中壯年與熟齡族群也同步投入市場，形成老中青三代齊參與的投資盛況。

news.Title: 輝達揮兵AI PC市場 攜聯發科.微軟打造筆電
news.Content:
[ 非凡新聞 ]記者黃靖棻,攝影陳昱志

輝達GTC大會今（1）日在北流舉行，執行長黃仁勳，再度把台灣供應鏈推上全球 AI 舞台，甚至連台灣小吃也入列，另外他強調，算力已成為可變現的收入單位，甚至是國家GDP的成長引擎，而輝達與聯發科聯手打造的PC晶片，也正式揭曉，宣告輝達將進入PC全新戰場。

輝達執行長 黃仁勳：「歡迎來到GTC台灣，很高興看到大家，回家感覺真好，今天來看我們龐大的生態系，有好多夥伴要感謝，我很愛台灣的生態系夥伴，有很多企業而我這是最愛的。」

供應鏈背板出現水果阿姨，還有不少輝達執行長黃仁勳來台灣最愛吃的餐廳，輝達GTC大會一開場就笑料不斷，隨著今年代理式AI大爆發，黃仁勳強調，如今算力即是獲利，更是國家GDP成長的關鍵。

輝達執行長 黃仁勳：「有人昨晚告訴我，台灣GDP年成長幾乎10%，實在不可思議，從產業角度看現在需求暢旺，因為想達到這成果必須更努力，現在token是獲利的工具，人工智慧公司想要更多token，生產更多token建造AI工廠，這就是算力需求在台灣，你們會變得這麼忙，台廠現在生意飆升的原因，事實上這看起來就像你們企業的股價。」

隨著vera rubin下半年進入量產，輝達在台灣已經擁有150家，供應鏈合作夥伴。

輝達執行長 黃仁勳：「Vera Rubin已經全面進入量產，打造出Vera Rubin的供應鏈，已經跟Blackwell一樣達到兩倍之多，這非常了不起，以往我們需要兩小時，在Blackwell機櫃運作，現在只需要五分鐘。」

黃仁勳認為AI並非取代軟體工程師，反而因產出大幅提升，企業更有理由聘用更多工程師，代理式AI可說是為軟體業開啟黃金時代。

輝達執行長 黃仁勳：「很多人問說嘿Jensen，代理AI來臨了，軟體公司是不是玩完了，我說事實恰恰相反，正因為有很多代理人出現，世界不再受限於人類數量，因此這些代理人將需要更多工具，這就是軟體公司的絕佳機會。」

而外界關注輝達跟聯發科，聯手打造的N1X晶片，由台積電以3奈米製程生產，也宣告輝達正式進入PC市場。

輝達執行長 黃仁勳：「這是史上最強晶片，N1X跟聯發科聯手打造，跑分紀錄已經看過了，N1X最漂亮的晶片，老實說我們花了32年打造，因為輝達所有的軟體堆疊都用這晶片跑，各位這是輝達RTX Spark筆電。」

黃仁勳表示N1X，不只是一般PC晶片，而是能讓使用者在本地端 PC ，執行大型模型與AI Agent 的關鍵平台，將橫跨桌機、PC等全產品線，有望在今年第三季上市。（記者黃靖棻、陳昱志／台北採訪報導）

news.Title: 黃仁勳開講AI添柴火 台股45K達陣盤中45931
news.Content:
[ 非凡新聞 ]記者林浩宇

輝達執行長黃仁勳今（1）日發表主題演講，台股也跟著歡慶行情，台積電、聯發科雙雙改寫歷史新高，AI概念股全面上攻，帶動加權指數盤中最高來到45931點，再寫歷史新頁，終場上漲604點，以45337點作收，站穩45000點整數大關，成交量1兆4770億元。隨著COMPUTEX展持續登場，加上6月股東會旺季展開，市場聚焦企業下半年營運展望、AI商機與獲利表現，法人也看好在題材面與基本面支撐下，台股有機會再挑戰更高點位。

民眾：「那時候還買在高點，那時候買在630元，是不小心搓到的，搓到的時候，同事們還蠻搞笑，哇你買在這麼高點，心情很歡樂啊，現在每天上班都很有動力。」

股民秀出對帳單，6月第一個交易日，護國神山台積電沒讓投資人失望，股價攻上2415元再創新高，電子權值股同步走強，聯發科衝上4710元同樣改寫新高，帶動加權指數持續向上衝刺。

《非凡新聞》記者 林浩宇：「輝達執行長黃仁勳1日發表主題演講，帶動台股強勢大漲，盤中一度大漲千點，成功站上45000點大關，刷新全新的天花板。」

不只電子權值股，AI伺服器、電腦周邊族群也表現亮眼，華碩、宏碁、精英、廣達、緯創等個股亮燈漲停，資金全面回流AI供應鏈，成為推升大盤的關鍵。

統一投顧董事長 黎方國：「盤面上還是相對強勢，個股是輪動的，可是最重要的上漲，還是來自科技股的帶動在未來Vera Rubin 300的帶動之下，下半年Vera Rubin 300應該會開始出貨，我想這也會帶動，原來的舊AI老AI這些，相關的組裝行情的一波上揚，所以我們對未來相關族群的看法，還是比較正面的。」

被動元件族群持續點火，多檔個股亮燈，國巨創下波段新高；記憶體族群華邦電、南亞科、力積電都創高；傳產股南亞亮紅燈，電子、傳產、金融通通都有攻勢。

統一投顧董事長 黎方國：「這個禮拜除了COMPUTEX展之外，還有6月4日的台積電股東會，我想CC魏執行長，也會為台積電未來的規劃展望提出一番願景，在這個題材面訊息面的加持之下，還有基本面的加持之下，台股指數沒有最高只有更高，投資人持股還是正面操作，未來題材面非常的多，整體的獲利數字非常好。」

除了台積電股東會將登場，本月還有1033家上市櫃公司股東會密集舉行，總市值超過90兆元，決議發放的現金股利也突破1.25兆元水準，還會釋出下半年展望、未來規劃，台股能否再挑戰更高點位，也讓市場充滿期待。（記者林浩宇、邱文傑／台北報導）
